style.en: Co-hosts who press in midfield bursts and build through possession with Liga MX-based technicians, leaning on home crowds and a deep, experienced spine. Strength is midfield control and squad depth; the main weakness is a chronic lack of a clinical, in-form center-forward and shaky concentration in defensive transitions.
style.zh: 作为东道主之一，墨西哥依靠以墨超球员为主的技术型中场打控球与局部压迫，背靠主场气氛和经验丰富的阵容骨架。强项是中场掌控力和阵容深度；最大短板是长期缺少一名稳定高效的中锋，且防守转换时注意力时常松懈。

en: Estadio Azteca atmosphere: Mexico open at home in front of ~87,000, a real edge in the group stage.
Teenager Gilberto Mora off the bench — at 17 he is the squad's brightest spark and a Real Madrid/Barcelona target.
Who finishes the chances: Raul Jimenez started the opener but out-of-form Milan striker Santiago Gimenez waits on the bench.
zh: 阿兹特克球场的主场氛围：墨西哥在约8.7万球迷面前开赛，小组赛的真实优势。
替补登场的17岁新星吉尔伯托·莫拉——本队最大亮点，皇马和巴萨的引援目标。
谁来把握机会：希门尼斯（劳尔）首发开局，而状态低迷的米兰中锋圣地亚哥·希门尼斯坐在替补席待命。

note.en: Captain; shifted to center back to cover the suspended Cesar Montes vs South Korea.
note.zh: 队长；对阵韩国时因蒙特斯停赛改踢中卫。

why.en: Captain and midfield-or-defense Swiss army knife who anchors the whole structure.
why.zh: 队长，能踢后腰也能踢中卫的体系核心。

why.en: At 17 the youngest player at the World Cup, a Gold Cup winner already drawing Real Madrid interest.
why.zh: 17岁，本届世界杯最年轻球员，已夺金杯赛冠军并受皇马关注。

note.en: 35-year-old talisman with 124 caps and 45 goals; veteran focal point up top.
Record-chasing veteran appearing at a sixth World Cup at age 40; backup but iconic.
note.zh: 40岁第六次参加世界杯（追平纪录），替补但是标志性人物。

note.en: First-choice center back; missed the South Korea game through suspension.
note.zh: 主力中卫，对阵韩国因停赛缺阵。

note.en: 20-year-old holding midfielder who earned a move to Atletico Madrid.

why.en: Milan's Mexican striker and the squad's most valuable player; the long-term goal threat ahead of veteran Jimenez.
why.zh: AC米兰墨西哥前锋，队内身价最高，未来锋线第一选择。

note.en: Young Liga MX striker valued at €15m, a rising attacking option.
note.zh: 墨超新星前锋，身价1500万欧。

style.en: Hugo Broos drills a disciplined, compact 5-3-2 built on a five-man defence and a hard-working midfield, springing forward through quick transitions and the dribbling of their young wide creators. Their strength is organisation, energy and a settled domestic core; the main weakness is a lack of top-level firepower and experience, with most of the squad based in the South African league.
style.zh: 主帅 Hugo Broos 打造了一支纪律严明、阵型紧凑的 5-3-2，依靠五后卫和勤奋的中场,通过快速转换和年轻边路创造者的盘带发动进攻。球队优势在于组织性、跑动和稳定的本土班底;主要短板是缺乏顶级火力与大赛经验,绝大多数球员效力于南非本土联赛。

en: Relebohile Mofokeng — the 21-year-old Orlando Pirates wonderkid is their X-factor off the bench, the PSL Player of the Season and the team's most likely game-breaker.
Lyle Foster, their only top-five-league striker, leading the line largely isolated — South Africa's goal threat rises and falls with him.
Whether Broos's low-block 5-3-2 can frustrate hosts Mexico in the Estadio Azteca opener and steal results from set pieces and counters.
zh: Relebohile Mofokeng——这位 21 岁的奥兰多海盗妖星是球队的奇兵,南非联赛赛季最佳球员,最可能在替补登场后改变比赛。
Lyle Foster 是唯一来自五大联赛的前锋,基本孤军作战——南非的进球威胁全系于他一身。
Broos 的低位防守 5-3-2 能否在阿兹特克球场的揭幕战中限制东道主墨西哥,并靠定位球和反击偷分。

why.en: Captain and talisman with the most caps in the group; a penalty-shootout hero whose shot-stopping keeps Bafana in tight games.
why.zh: 队长兼精神领袖，全组出场次数最多；点球大战英雄，扑救能力让南非在硬仗中站稳脚跟。

note.en: 20-year-old centre-back whose value exploded after a December 2025 move to MLS; a breakout star of the qualifying run.
note.zh: 20岁中卫，2025年12月转会MLS后身价暴涨；预选赛阶段的新星。

note.en: Midfield metronome and set-piece weapon — but suspended for the next group game vs Korea after a booking accumulation.
note.zh: 中场节拍器兼定位球武器，但因累计黄牌将停赛缺席下一场对阵韩国的比赛。

why.en: Bafana's qualifying creator-in-chief — involved in twice as many goals as any teammate; starred against Czechia.
why.zh: 南非预选赛头号创造者，参与进球数是队友的两倍；对阵捷克表现抢眼。

note.en: Started vs Mexico but sent off; serves suspension before returning to bolster the midfield.
note.zh: 对阵墨西哥首发却被罚下；停赛后将回归加固中场。

why.en: 21-year-old Orlando Pirates wonderkid and the squad's brightest long-term prospect; an impact option off the bench.
why.zh: 21岁的海盗天才小将，全队最被看好的未来之星；替补登场的奇兵。

note.en: Premier League striker and by far the squad's most valuable player; started vs Mexico, dropped to bench vs Czechia.
note.zh: 英超前锋，全队身价最高者；对阵墨西哥首发，对阵捷克退居替补。

style.en: A disciplined, low-possession transition team that sits in a compact mid-block and springs fast counters through its wing-backs and technical front line; Kim Min-jae's recovery pace lets them defend high when needed. Main weakness is thin, lower-quality full-back/wing-back depth and an over-reliance on aging stars Son and Lee Jae-sung for creation.
style.zh: 纪律性强、不追求控球的转换型球队，惯用紧凑的中场区域防守，再通过翼卫和技术型前场快速反击；金玟哉的回追速度让他们必要时能压高防线。主要短板是边翼卫位置的深度和质量偏薄，且进攻创造过度依赖年龄渐长的孙兴慜和李在城。

en: Son Heung-min at his fourth and likely final World Cup as captain — his shot-making and set-piece delivery are Korea's biggest match-winning lever
Kim Min-jae vs elite center-forwards — his duels and recovery sprints anchor a back three that can be exposed in wide areas
Lee Kang-in's left foot in the half-spaces — the chief creator who turns slow build-up into chances
zh: 孙兴慜以队长身份出战第四届、很可能是最后一届世界杯——他的射门和定位球传送是韩国最大的制胜手段
金玟哉对位顶级中锋——他的一对一和回追是这条三后卫的定海神针，但边路空当可能被打穿
李刚仁的左脚在肋部区域——核心组织者，能把缓慢的推进变成机会

why.en: Bayern's elite ball-winning centre-back and the spine of Korea's back three.
why.zh: 拜仁主力中卫，韩国三中卫体系的轴心，对抗和出球俱佳。

note.en: Breakout opening-week form has triggered transfer interest from bigger clubs.
note.zh: 开赛首周表现亮眼，已引来更大俱乐部的转会兴趣。

note.en: Scored the 67' equaliser in the 2-1 comeback win over Czechia.
note.zh: 对捷克2-1逆转中第67分钟攻入扳平球。

why.en: PSG playmaker and Korea's most valuable player; the creative engine behind Son.
why.zh: 巴黎组织核心，韩国身价最高的球员，孙兴慜身后的创造力发动机。

why.en: Captain, talisman and all-time top scorer (56 goals) leading the line at his last World Cup.
why.zh: 队长兼旗帜、队史第一射手（56球），最后一届世界杯领衔锋线。

why.en: German-born Bundesliga midfielder who chose Korea; the squad's rising box-to-box talent.
why.zh: 德国出生、选择代表韩国的德甲中场，全队最具上升空间的B2B新星。

note.en: Super-sub: scored the 80' winner off the bench vs Czechia.
note.zh: 超级替补：替补登场在第80分钟攻入对捷克的制胜球。

style.en: A compact, disciplined 3-4-2-1 built on a Slavia Prague core: deep defensive structure, hard pressing in central areas, and direct, vertical supply to target man Patrik Schick, with set pieces (Soucek, Krejci) a primary weapon. Main weakness is a thin, low-value creative pool and shaky full-back/wing-back depth that struggles to break down organised low blocks.
style.zh: 以布拉格斯拉维亚为班底的紧凑型3-4-2-1：防线站位深、中路逼抢凶狠，强调快速直传给支点中锋希克，并把定位球(苏切克、克莱伊奇)当作主要得分手段。主要短板是创造力储备薄、身价偏低，翼卫深度不足，面对摆大巴的密集防守时破局乏力。

en: Patrik Schick as the focal No. 10/striker — six goals in seven major-tournament games; if Czechia score, he is usually involved
Set-piece threat: 1.92m Tomas Soucek arriving late into the box plus captain Ladislav Krejci — a large share of Czech goals come from dead balls
Pavel Sulc, the squad's most valuable outfielder, drifting between the lines as the main creative spark behind Schick
zh: 希克作为前场支点/影锋——大赛7场打入6球，捷克进球往往和他有关
定位球杀伤:1.92米的苏切克后插上加上队长克莱伊奇,捷克相当一部分进球来自定位球
队内身价最高的球员舒尔茨在肋部串联,是希克身后最主要的创造力来源

note.en: No.1 since Vaclik retired; rising at PSV.
note.zh: 瓦茨利克退役后的头号门将，在埃因霍温稳步上升。

note.en: Veteran right wing-back; his long throws are a real weapon (assisted Krejci's goal vs Korea).
note.zh: 老将右翼卫，长距离手抛球是武器，对韩国助攻克莱伊奇头球破门。

why.en: Captain and the squad's most valuable outfielder; ball-playing CB who scored Czechia's opener vs South Korea.
why.zh: 队长，阵中身价最高的球员，善于出球的中卫，对韩国头球先拔头筹。

note.en: Listed as a midfielder but deployed as left wing-back in the back five.
note.zh: 名册上是中场，实战中在五后卫体系里踢左翼卫。

note.en: Scored the earliest goal of the tournament (6') vs South Africa.
note.zh: 对南非第6分钟破门，全届赛事最早进球。

note.en: 35-year-old former Hertha captain, back home, anchors midfield.
note.zh: 35岁前柏林赫塔队长，回归国内联赛，中场定海神针。

note.en: Versatile forward, partners Schick up top.
note.zh: 全能前锋，与希克搭档锋线。

why.en: Talisman striker, 25 goals in 52 caps and a Bundesliga winner; Czechia's primary goal threat.
why.zh: 头号射手，52场国家队25球、德甲冠军，捷克最大的进球威胁。

note.en: Young keeper whose Braga rise pushed his value above the No.1; one for the future.
note.zh: 年轻门将，在布拉加身价飙升超过头号门将，未来之选。

note.en: Started the opener vs South Korea, rotated out for South Africa.
note.zh: 对韩国首发，对南非被轮换。

why.en: Premier League midfield engine and ex-captain; box-to-box presence and aerial threat, benched vs South Africa but a key starter.
why.zh: 英超中场发动机、前队长，攻防转换与争顶能力强，对南非替补但仍是关键主力。

note.en: Creative starter vs South Korea; left-footed playmaker.
note.zh: 对韩国首发的创造者，左脚组织核心。

why.en: Squad's joint-most-valuable player; €20m Lyon attacking midfielder Lyon reportedly rate near €45-50m.
why.zh: 阵中身价并列最高，里昂攻击型中场，俱乐部内部估值近4500-5000万欧。

note.en: Towering target-man option off the bench.

style.en: High-energy, vertical pressing under Jesse Marsch — Canada win the ball high and counter at pace through fast wide players, with Jonathan David as the focal point. Their main weakness is squad depth and finishing quality once the press is bypassed, plus heavy reliance on a possibly half-fit Alphonso Davies.
style.zh: 在主帅马尔施手下打高位逼抢、快速由守转攻的垂直足球——高位夺回球权后通过两翼速度快速反击，以乔纳森·戴维为前场支点。主要短板是阵容深度和把握机会的能力，一旦逼抢被破解就显薄弱，且过度依赖伤情存疑的阿方索·戴维斯。

en: Alphonso Davies' fitness — a hamstring issue makes him doubtful for the June 12 opener; if he returns he reclaims left-back and supercharges the attack.
Jonathan David leading the line after his move to Juventus — Canada's chief goal threat and penalty-box finisher.
Home-host energy in Toronto and Vancouver — Canada's high press feeds off a loud crowd in their first home World Cup since 1986.
zh: 阿方索·戴维斯的伤情——大腿伤病让他可能缺席6月12日揭幕战；一旦复出将回到左后卫并大幅提升进攻火力。
加盟尤文图斯后的乔纳森·戴维领衔锋线——加拿大头号得分点和禁区终结者。
多伦多与温哥华的主场氛围——这是加拿大自1986年以来首次主办世界杯，高位逼抢将借助震天的主场声势。

why.en: Box-to-box engine; carries and breaks lines from deep, Canada's midfield heartbeat.
why.zh: 全能中场发动机，从后场带球、撕开防线，是加拿大中场的心脏。

why.en: Juventus striker and Canada's record scorer — clinical, mobile, the focal point up top.
why.zh: 尤文前锋、加拿大队史射手王，冷静、灵活，是锋线核心。

why.en: Bayern flyer and captain returning from ACL injury — Canada's highest-ceiling, game-breaking talent.
why.zh: 拜仁边路飞翼兼队长，刚从十字韧带伤愈复出，是加拿大上限最高、能一锤定音的球员。

note.en: Started on the bench vs Qatar while managing his return to fitness; expected to reclaim a starting role.
note.zh: 对卡塔尔一役因复出节奏控制而替补登场，预计将重夺首发位置。

note.en: Physical, ball-carrying center-back and a likely starter once fully rotated in.
note.zh: 身体强壮、善于带球出球的中卫，轮换到位后很可能进入首发。

style.en: A physical, high-energy 4-4-2 built on quick vertical transitions and crosses for the box, with veteran captain Edin Dzeko as the focal point and Ermedin Demirovic doing the link-up running around him. Strength is aerial threat and front-foot aggression; the main weakness is an ageing, modest-pedigree spine that can be pulled apart by sharper passing teams and lacks elite pace at the back.
style.zh: 波黑踢的是高强度、快速纵向转换的 4-4-2，依靠快速推进和传中找禁区里的支点，40 岁老队长哲科是进攻核心，德米罗维奇在他身边做串联和跑动脏活。强项是制空能力和前压的侵略性；主要短板是中轴年龄偏大、整体球员档次一般，面对传控更细腻的球队容易被撕开，后防也缺乏顶级速度。

en: Edin Dzeko at 40 — the all-time top scorer leads a major tournament one last time; watch whether he can still finish the chances Demirovic creates.
Set pieces and crosses — with Dzeko, Tabakovic and Demirovic, Bosnia are dangerous in the air and lean on dead-ball deliveries.
The young flanks — Esmir Bajraktarevic (PSV) and Kerim Alajbegovic (Salzburg) provide the pace and dribbling that the veteran spine lacks.
zh: 40 岁的哲科——队史第一射手最后一次站上大赛舞台，看他还能否把握住德米罗维奇创造的机会。
定位球和传中——有哲科、塔巴科维奇和德米罗维奇，波黑空中威胁极大，很依赖死球进攻。
年轻边路——巴伊拉克塔雷维奇(PSV)和阿拉伊贝戈维奇(萨尔茨堡)带来老化中轴缺乏的速度和盘带。

why.en: 23-year-old ball-playing centre-back, the squad's most valuable asset and defensive linchpin.
why.zh: 23岁出球型中卫，全队身价最高、防线核心。

why.en: 18-year-old Salzburg wonderkid, €22m and starting on the wing — Bosnia's future.
why.zh: 18岁萨尔茨堡新星，身价2200万欧已首发边路，波黑的未来。

why.en: 40-year-old captain and all-time top scorer (73 goals, 148 caps) leading a second-ever World Cup.
why.zh: 40岁队长、队史第一射手（73球148场），率队第二次出征世界杯。

note.en: Late call-up replacing the injured Nidal Celik (Lens).
note.zh: 替补受伤的尼达尔·切利克（朗斯）临时入选。

note.en: 21-year-old PSV winger who scored the winning playoff penalty vs Italy.
note.zh: 21岁埃因霍温边锋，附加赛对意大利罚进制胜点球。

style.en: Two-time Asian champions built almost entirely on the Qatar Stars League, Qatar play a possession-based 4-3-3 under Lopetegui with patient build-up and quick combinations channelled to star winger Akram Afif. Their identity is technical control and a compact mid-block; the weakness is a lack of pace, physicality and elite individual quality against top opposition, plus thin defensive cover.
style.zh: 两届亚洲杯冠军，阵容几乎全部来自卡塔尔联赛。洛佩特吉的球队踢控球型 4-3-3，强调耐心组织和快速短传配合，最终把球喂给边路核心阿菲夫。球队特点是技术细腻、中场紧凑的中低位防守；弱点是面对强队时速度、身体对抗和个人能力不足，后防深度也偏薄。

en: Akram Afif on the left — direct dribbling and set-piece delivery are Qatar's main route to goals
Whether the QSL-based block can contain quicker, more physical European/American attacks without conceding early
Almoez Ali's movement — Qatar's record scorer needs service in a side that struggles to create chances
zh: 左路的阿菲夫——突破和定位球是卡塔尔最主要的得分手段
以本土联赛球员为主的防守体系能否顶住更快、更强壮的欧美进攻而不早早丢球
纪录射手阿尔莫埃兹·阿里的跑位——在一支创造机会能力有限的球队里他需要喂球

why.en: First-choice keeper and a shot-stopping anchor; Qatar will rely on him heavily to stay in games.
why.zh: 主力门将，扑救能力是球队保命关键，卡塔尔要靠他来咬住比分。

why.en: Qatar's all-time top scorer (55 goals) and Asian Cup Golden Boot winner — their one proven finisher.
why.zh: 卡塔尔队史第一射手（55 球）、亚洲杯金靴，是球队唯一稳定的终结点。

why.en: Two-time Asian Player of the Year and the squad's most valuable, creative outlet — Qatar's chances live and die with him.
why.zh: 两届亚洲足球先生、全队身价最高的创造力核心——卡塔尔的命运基本系于他一人。

style.en: A disciplined, control-first side that defends in a compact block and grinds out results rather than overwhelming opponents; the Akanji-anchored back line plus the Xhaka double pivot give them rare structural calm. Main weakness is a thin, ageing striker pool and reliance on transition speed from Ndoye and Vargas to create chances.
style.zh: 瑞士是一支以控制和纪律为先的球队,防守时收缩成紧凑的防线,靠磨而非碾压拿分;阿坎吉领衔的后防加上扎卡的双后腰,让他们拥有少见的结构稳定性。主要短板是中锋线偏老、深度薄弱,进攻很大程度依赖恩多耶和巴尔加斯的转换速度来制造机会。

en: Dan Ndoye's direct running on the right — his pace in transition is Switzerland's main route to goal
Granit Xhaka conducting tempo from deep at his fourth World Cup as captain — he sets the rhythm
Whether 20-year-old Johan Manzambi changes a stalemate off the bench — Europe's hottest young Swiss talent
zh: 恩多耶在右路的直线突破——他的转换速度是瑞士最主要的得分路径
队长扎卡在第四届世界杯上从后场调度节奏——全队的节拍器
20岁的曼赞比能否替补登场打破僵局——目前欧洲最炙手可热的瑞士新星

why.en: Elite shot-stopper and the squad's most valuable player; a top-tier Bundesliga keeper who keeps Switzerland in tight games.
why.zh: 顶级门将,全队身价最高的球员;德甲一流门将,能在焦灼比赛中救主。

why.en: The defensive linchpin: a ball-playing centre-back whose composure and recovery pace let the whole back line push up.
why.zh: 防线核心:出球型中卫,冷静且回追速度快,让整条后防线得以前压。

why.en: Switzerland's breakout star and most expensive outfield player; explosive pace and end product on the flank drive the attack.
why.zh: 瑞士的突破之星,身价最高的非门将球员;边路的爆发力和终结能力是进攻引擎。

why.en: 20-year-old wonderkid courted by Europe's biggest clubs after a Europa League final run; a game-changing option off the bench.
why.zh: 20岁妖星,欧联杯决赛之旅后引来欧洲豪门追逐;替补登场的改变比赛者。

style.en: Under Ancelotti, Brazil blend a compact defensive block with explosive transition play, leaning on world-class wide forwards to win games one-on-one. Strength is individual attacking quality; the main weakness is an aging, makeshift back line and a long-running uncertainty over the center-forward role.
style.zh: 安切洛蒂麾下的巴西兼具紧凑的防守结构与爆发力极强的反击,核心是依靠维尼修斯、拉菲尼亚等世界级边锋在一对一中制造杀机。最大优势是个人进攻天赋,主要短板则是后防线老化、临时拼凑,以及长期悬而未决的中锋人选问题。

en: Vinicius Jr vs Morocco-style low blocks: whether he can break down packed defenses or gets frustrated and drifts.
The center-forward question: Ancelotti rotating Matheus Cunha and Igor Thiago as the No. 9, with no settled finisher.
Neymar's role at 34: used as an impact sub and set-piece weapon rather than a starter.
zh: 维尼修斯面对摩洛哥式密集防守:他能否撕开铁桶阵,还是会急躁、游离出比赛。
中锋之谜:安切洛蒂在马特乌斯·库尼亚和伊戈尔·蒂亚戈之间轮换9号位,缺乏稳定的终结点。
34岁内马尔的角色:更多作为奇兵替补和定位球武器,而非首发。

why.en: Brazil's midfield engine and tempo-setter, linking the back line to a fearsome front three.
why.zh: 巴西中场的发动机与节奏掌控者,串联后防与令人胆寒的前场三叉戟。

why.en: Coming off a monster season at Barcelona; relentless from the right with goals, assists and pressing.
why.zh: 刚经历巴萨爆发赛季,右路威胁不断,集进球、助攻与逼抢于一身。

why.en: The team's match-winner and most valuable asset; unplayable one-on-one when in form.
why.zh: 球队的胜负手与身价之最,状态在线时一对一无解。

why.en: At 34 and wearing the iconic No. 10, Brazil's all-time top scorer returns as a creative super-sub.
why.zh: 34岁身披标志性10号,巴西历史最佳射手以创造型超级替补身份回归。

style.en: Compact, disciplined block that defends in numbers and springs forward through Hakimi's overlaps and quick transitions to technical attackers like Brahim Diaz and El Khannouss; clinical on set pieces. Main weakness is centre-back depth, badly exposed after Aguerd's injury, leaving an inexperienced Diop-Riad pairing against elite forwards.
style.zh: 摩洛哥踢的是纪律严明、人数充足的低位防守反击：先稳住阵型，再靠哈基米的边路套上和快速转换,把球送到布拉欣·迪亚斯、埃尔·汉努斯这些技术型攻击手脚下，定位球极具威胁。最大短板是中卫厚度——阿格德伤缺后，迪奥普与里亚德这对经验不足的组合面对顶级前锋时容易被打穿。

en: Achraf Hakimi bombing forward from right-back — Morocco's primary attacking outlet and a constant overload threat down the right.
The makeshift Diop-Riad centre-back pairing (barely 10 caps between them) coping without the injured Nayef Aguerd against pacey forwards.
Brahim Diaz and Bilal El Khannouss combining in the half-spaces — Morocco's main source of creativity and the key to unlocking deep blocks.
zh: 关注哈基米从右后卫位置不断前插——这是摩洛哥最主要的进攻出口，右路常制造人数优势。
临时拼凑的迪奥普-里亚德中卫组合（两人国家队出场加起来才约10次）在阿格德伤缺下如何应对快速前锋。
布拉欣·迪亚斯与比拉尔·埃尔·汉努斯在肋部的配合——这是摩洛哥创造力的核心，也是撬开密集防守的钥匙。

why.en: Morocco's captain and best player — an elite, marauding right-back whose overlapping runs are the team's chief attacking weapon.
why.zh: 摩洛哥队长兼头号球星——顶级进攻型右后卫，套边前插是球队最主要的进攻武器。

note.zh: 阿格德伤缺后的替补中卫

note.en: Versatile full-back; recovered from shoulder knock
note.zh: 全能边后卫；肩伤已恢复

why.en: At 18 the squad's breakout star and biggest riser — preferred over veteran Amrabat as the pivot's engine.
why.zh: 年仅18岁的球队新星和身价飙升最快者——被主帅选作中场枢纽，力压老将阿姆拉巴特。

why.en: Real Madrid's silky playmaker — Morocco's brightest creative spark, drifting inside to manufacture chances.
why.zh: 皇马的灵巧组织者——摩洛哥最闪亮的创造力来源，内收策动威胁进攻。

note.en: Deployed as mobile false-9 in the XI
note.zh: 在首发中出任灵活的伪九号

note.en: Pacey wide attacker off the bench

style.en: A disciplined, compact mid/low block built on defensive resilience (just six goals conceded across the final qualifying round) that springs into quick vertical counters through Premier League pace. Main weaknesses are sustained possession and final-third creativity, with attackers often left isolated.
style.zh: 海地踢的是纪律严明、阵型紧凑的中低位防守反击，防线坚韧（世预赛最后阶段六场仅丢六球），抢断后依靠英超级别的速度打快速直传反击。主要短板是控球组织和最后一传的创造力，前锋常陷入孤立无援。

en: Wilson Isidor's runs in behind — Haiti's whole attack is built around feeding their Sunderland striker on the counter.
How long the back four and Placide can hold the compact block against Brazil's and Morocco's wide overloads.
Bellegarde driving from midfield — the one player who can carry the ball through the lines and create from nothing.
zh: 看伊西多尔的反越位插上——海地整套进攻就是围绕喂球给这位桑德兰前锋打反击。
看后防四人组和门将普拉西德能把紧凑防守阵型顶多久，尤其面对巴西、摩洛哥的边路人数压制。
看贝勒加尔德从中场带球突进——全队唯一能带球穿透防线、无中生有创造机会的人。

why.en: Premier League midfielder and Haiti's chief ball-carrier — the engine that turns defense into attack.
why.zh: 英超中场，海地的核心持球人——把防守转化为进攻的发动机。

why.en: Sunderland striker who switched from France; Haiti's most valuable player and primary counter-attack outlet.
why.zh: 桑德兰前锋，从法国转投海地；全队身价最高、反击的头号终结点。

why.en: Haiti's all-time leading scorer (44 goals) and qualifying hero with six goals including a hat-trick vs Costa Rica.
why.zh: 海地历史第一射手（44球），世预赛功臣，攻入6球含对哥斯达黎加帽子戏法。

style.en: Steve Clarke's Scotland are pragmatic, defensively compact and dangerous on the counter and from set pieces, built around a hard-working mid-block and full-backs who get forward. Their strength is collective organization and late-game spirit; the weakness is a thin pool of genuinely top-level attacking talent and reliance on McTominay for goals.
style.zh: 史蒂夫·克拉克的苏格兰打法务实，防守紧凑，依靠中场逼抢、反击和定位球制造威胁，体系围绕勤勉的中场区块和插上助攻的边后卫搭建。强项是整体组织和顽强的下半场韧性；弱点是真正顶级进攻人才储备偏薄，进球过度依赖麦克托米奈。

en: Scott McTominay's late runs into the box from midfield — Scotland's biggest goal threat
Set pieces both ways: Robertson and McGinn delivery is a real weapon against bigger sides
Whether the 4-4-2 can contain Brazil's attack or gets overrun in the final group game
zh: 麦克托米奈从中场后插上禁区的跑位——苏格兰最大的进球威胁
双向定位球：罗伯逊和麦金的传中对阵强队是一件真正的武器
4-4-2阵型能否在收官战中限制住巴西的进攻，还是会被压制

why.en: Captain and most-capped man in the squad; his overlapping runs and delivery from left-back set Scotland's tempo.
why.zh: 队长，队内出场最多的球员；左后卫位置上的套边和传中决定了苏格兰的进攻节奏。

why.en: Explosive young winger and Scotland's main source of one-on-one verticality and pace.
why.zh: 爆发力十足的年轻边锋，是苏格兰一对一突破和纵向速度的主要来源。

why.en: Reigning Serie A Player of the Year and Scotland's talisman — his late box arrivals are the team's top goal source.
why.zh: 现任意甲最佳球员，苏格兰的核心王牌——后插上进禁区是球队最主要的进球来源。

style.en: A high-pressing, transition-driven side built on Pochettino's aggressive front-foot identity, with Pulisic the creative hub and pace in wide areas; the main weakness is a young, error-prone back line and reliance on Balogun's finishing for goals.
style.zh: 波切蒂诺打造的高位逼抢、快速转换型球队，强调前场压迫与边路速度，普利西奇是创造力核心；主要弱点是后防年轻、易出错，进球过度依赖巴洛贡的把握机会能力。

en: Pulisic drifting inside from the left to link with Tillman — the USA's primary source of chance creation
Pochettino's fluid full-backs: Dest and Robinson both push high, leaving counter-attacking space behind
Home-tournament energy and crowd pressure — can the young defense stay composed against quality strikers
zh: 普利西奇从左路内切与蒂尔曼联动——这是美国队创造机会的主要来源
波切蒂诺的边后卫前插：德斯特和罗宾逊都压得很高，身后留下被反击的空间
主场办赛的氛围与观众压力——年轻后防面对强力前锋能否保持冷静

why.en: Captain and talisman; the USA's best dribbler and chance-creator, he carries the team's attacking burden.
why.zh: 队长兼旗帜人物，全队最强的盘带与创造力来源，扛起进攻重担。

why.en: Breakout star whose relentless pressing and goal threat from the half-spaces give the USA a second elite attacker.
why.zh: 赛季爆发的新星，不知疲倦的逼抢与肋部进球威胁，为美国队提供第二个顶级攻击点。

why.en: Lethal poacher and the squad's best pure finisher off the bench — a proven game-changer when chasing a goal.
why.zh: 嗅觉敏锐的禁区杀手，替补登场的最佳纯射手，追分时的奇兵。

style.en: Gustavo Alfaro's 'Professor' Paraguay is a disciplined, defense-first side built on a compact low block and ferocious transition counters - they conceded barely 0.56 goals per game in qualifying. The flip side is one of the weakest attacks at the tournament, so results hinge on clean sheets and clinical finishing from Enciso and Sanabria.
style.zh: 阿尔法罗打造的'教授式'巴拉圭防守至上、组织严密，以紧凑的低位防线和凶狠的快速反击立足，预选赛场均仅失0.56球。代价是进攻火力位列本届最弱之一，因此战绩高度依赖零封对手以及恩西索、萨纳夫里亚的把握机会能力。

en: Whether the disciplined low block can frustrate higher-ranked opponents and drag games to the final 20 minutes
Julio Enciso's individual moments - he is the one player who can unlock a parked bus with a single touch
Set pieces and transition counters: with low possession, restarts and fast breaks are Paraguay's main route to goal
zh: 纪律严明的低位防守能否拖住排名更高的对手，把比赛拖入最后20分钟
胡里奥·恩西索的个人闪光时刻——他是唯一能凭一脚触球打破铁桶阵的球员
定位球与反击转换：控球率偏低，定位球和快速反击是巴拉圭最主要的得分途径

why.en: Premier League centre-back and the defensive anchor of Alfaro's low block - aggressive, physical, and Paraguay's most valuable defender.
why.zh: 英超中卫，阿尔法罗低位防线的防守核心——强硬、身体出众，是巴拉圭身价最高的后卫。

why.en: Premier League box-to-box engine and joint most valuable player in the squad - drives Paraguay's transitions from deep.
why.zh: 英超攻防一体的发动机，与恩西索并列队内身价最高——从后场带动巴拉圭的攻防转换。

why.en: The 22-year-old creative engine and Paraguay's one true difference-maker - capable of unlocking a packed defense with a single moment of magic.
why.zh: 22岁的创造力核心，巴拉圭唯一真正的胜负手——能凭一瞬间的灵光打破密集防守。

style.en: Popovic's Socceroos are a compact, hard-working low block: a back five packs the centre, the wing-backs do huge defensive shifts, and the threat comes almost entirely from fast transitions and turnovers rather than sustained possession. Organised and awkward to break down, their weakness is a thin attack and wing-backs who can be isolated one-on-one against quality wide players.
style.zh: 波波维奇的澳大利亚是一支纪律严明、跑动凶狠的防守反击球队：五后卫密集保护中路，两个翼卫承担大量回防任务，进攻几乎完全依靠快速转换和断球反击，而非控球组织。整体防守稳固、极难攻破，但软肋是锋线人才单薄，翼卫在面对高水平边路球员的一对一时容易被针对。

en: Jordan Bos vs Nestory Irankunda on the flanks — Australia's two highest-ceiling players, both the outlet for counters and the main creative spark.
How the back three of Circati, Souttar and Burgess holds up — they shut out Turkiye 2-0 in the opener but can be stretched if the wing-backs get pinned.
Transition moments: Australia sit deep and strike on the break, so the danger spikes the instant they win the ball, not when they have it.
zh: 边路的博斯与伊兰昆达——澳大利亚潜力最高的两名球员，既是反击出球点，也是主要的创造力来源。
奇尔卡蒂、苏塔尔和伯吉斯组成的三中卫能否顶住——揭幕战2比0零封土耳其，但若翼卫被压制，防线会被拉扯出空当。
转换瞬间：澳大利亚深度退防、伺机反击，所以最危险的不是他们控球时，而是刚断球的那一刻。

note.en: Shock starter over Ryan, kept a clean sheet on debut
note.zh: 力压瑞安的爆冷首发，处子秀零封对手

why.en: Serie A centre-back and the calm leader of the back three at just 22 — Australia's defensive cornerstone.
why.zh: 意甲中卫，年仅22岁却是三中卫的冷静领袖，澳大利亚防线的基石。

note.en: 6'6" aerial wall, back from Achilles injury
note.zh: 1米98的空中屏障，跟腱伤愈复出

why.en: Feyenoord's marauding left wing-back and Australia's most valuable, highest-ceiling player — the team's main attacking outlet down the left.
why.zh: 费耶诺德的进攻型左翼卫，澳大利亚身价最高、上限最高的球员，球队左路最主要的进攻出口。

note.zh: 德甲全能中场，对土耳其破门
年轻发动机，揭幕战助攻

why.en: Explosive, direct winger who scored in the World Cup opener — Australia's most dangerous one-on-one threat in transition.
why.zh: 爆发力强、直接犯禁区的边锋，世界杯揭幕战破门，是澳大利亚反击中最具威胁的一对一爆点。

note.en: Lone striker, holds the line for counters
Captain and 4th World Cup, benched for Beach
note.zh: 队长、第四届世界杯，被比奇挤到替补
有创造力的奇兵替补，由意大利转投澳大利亚
无国家队出场的前锋，热身赛进球
替补登场的定位球专家

note.en: Veteran 4th World Cup, experience off the bench
note.zh: 老将，第四届世界杯，替补经验

style.en: A possession-based, technically gifted side built around one of the tournament's most exciting young attacking cores (Güler, Yıldız, Uzun) with Çalhanoğlu dictating from a deep pivot; they retain the ball, attack through clever positional rotations and set-piece quality. Main weaknesses are a thin, ageing centre-back pool and a lack of a proven top-level No. 9, which can leave dominant possession short of cutting edge.
style.zh: 以控球和技术见长的球队，进攻核心是赛事中最令人兴奋的年轻一代（居莱尔、伊尔德兹、乌赞），恰尔汗奥卢居后组织调度；他们靠传控、灵活的换位跑动和定位球质量制造威胁。主要短板是中卫深度薄且偏老化，加上缺乏稳定的顶级中锋，常常控球占优却缺少最后一击。

en: Arda Güler operating between the lines as a free No. 10 — Türkiye's whole attack runs through his left foot
Calf-injury watch on Kenan Yıldız: if he's not fit, the attack loses its most direct dribbler and Deniz Gül leads a less proven line
Set pieces — with Çalhanoğlu's delivery and Demiral/Bardakcı's aerial presence, dead balls are a real scoring route
zh: 关注阿尔达·居莱尔作为自由 10 号在防线之间的串联——土耳其整条进攻线都依赖他的左脚
凯南·伊尔德兹的小腿伤情：若无法出战，进攻将失去最具突破力的球员，改由经验更浅的德尼兹·居尔领衔锋线
定位球——恰尔汗奥卢的传中加上德米拉尔、巴尔达克奇的高空优势，死球是真正的得分途径

note.en: Aerial leader of the back line

note.zh: 身价最高的后卫，套边进攻点

why.en: Captain and metronome — sprays passes and threatens from deep set pieces and long range.
why.zh: 队长兼节拍器，长传调度并能从远射和定位球直接威胁球门。

note.zh: 中场屏障，负责拦截抢断
右路直接而强力的突击手

why.en: Türkiye's chief creator — a Real Madrid left-footed playmaker who unlocks defences between the lines.
why.zh: 土耳其的核心组织者，皇马的左脚指挥官，能在防线之间撕开对手。

why.en: Juventus' star winger and the team's most explosive dribbler — but a calf injury puts his opener in doubt.
why.zh: 尤文图斯的明星边锋，球队最具爆发力的盘带手——但小腿伤让他的首战出场存疑。

note.zh: 多面手前锋，担任锋线尖刀
抗压能力强的中场轮换

note.en: Young No. 9 option / Yıldız-injury plan B
note.zh: 年轻中锋选择 / 伊尔德兹伤缺的 B 计划

why.en: €45m breakout talent — a goal-scoring attacking mid who gives Montella a high-ceiling super-sub.
why.zh: 身价 4500 万欧的新星，能进球的进攻中场，是蒙特拉手中潜力极高的奇兵。

style.en: Possession-based, positional play built around an elite young attacking core (Wirtz, Musiala, Sane) feeding a false-nine; aggressive high press and quick combinations in the final third. Biggest weakness is the lack of a world-class out-and-out striker, forcing Havertz into an unnatural No.9 role and leaving them short of a reliable goal-poacher.
style.zh: 以控球和位置足球为核心，依靠维尔茨、穆夏拉、萨内这批顶级年轻攻击群供球给一名伪九号，高位逼抢加上禁区前沿的快速配合是其招牌。最大短板是缺少世界级正印中锋，逼得哈弗茨踢并不擅长的伪九，临门一脚缺乏稳定的终结点。

en: Wirtz-Musiala interplay: two €100m+ playmakers dovetailing in the same front line is the tournament's most dangerous creative pairing
Manuel Neuer at 40 in his fifth and final World Cup, reversing retirement to reclaim the No.1 shirt
The No.9 question: watch whether Havertz as a false nine clicks, or whether Nagelsmann turns to Woltemade/Undav for a true striker
zh: 维尔茨与穆夏拉的连线：两名身价过亿欧的组织核心同处锋线，是本届最具威胁的创造力组合
40岁的诺伊尔第五次也是最后一次世界杯，结束退役重新披上1号球衣
九号位悬念：看哈弗茨踢伪九能否打通，还是纳格尔斯曼改用沃尔特马德/翁达夫上真中锋

why.en: Euro 2024's breakout star, back from a broken leg; even at 95% one of the world's best dribblers in tight spaces.
why.zh: 欧洲杯2024的爆发之星，刚从断腿伤愈复出；即便只有九成五状态，仍是世界顶级的狭小空间盘带手。

why.en: Germany's most valuable player and creative engine; versatile across the front line and dangerous both with and without the ball.
why.zh: 德国身价最高的球员和创造力引擎；锋线全能，有球无球都极具威胁。

why.en: Newcastle's club-record signing and Germany's most natural out-and-out striker option off the bench.
why.zh: 纽卡斯尔队史标王，是德国替补席上最接近正印中锋的选择。

style.en: The smallest nation ever at a World Cup: a Dutch-Curaçaoan diaspora side that sits in a compact low block, defends its shape with discipline, and plays direct (nearly 33 accurate long balls per match) to spring quick counters. Conceded just 3 goals in their last 6 qualifiers, but offers little creativity in possession and is vulnerable to elite possession sides.
style.zh: 史上参加世界杯最小的国家：一支由荷兰-库拉索侨民组成的球队，依靠紧凑的低位防守区块、纪律严明的阵型，并以长传直塞（场均近33次成功长传）打快速反击。资格赛最后6场仅丢3球，防守稳固，但持球进攻缺乏创造力，面对顶级控球强队时容易被打穿。

en: Can Advocaat's deep block survive Germany's Musiala/Wirtz overloads, or do they get pulled apart
Transition speed on the break: Kenji Gorré and Gervane Kastaneer chasing balls in behind
Set pieces and dead-ball delivery from captain Leandro Bacuna and brother Juninho
zh: 阿德沃卡特的深度防守区块能否扛住德国穆西亚拉/维尔茨的局部人数优势，还是会被撕开
反击转换速度：戈雷和卡斯塔内尔在身后空当的冲击
队长莱安德罗·巴库纳和弟弟尤尼尼奥的定位球与死球传中

why.en: PSV-schooled centre-back and the squad's defensive leader; how long he keeps Germany out sets Curaçao's ceiling.
why.zh: PSV出品的中卫、球队防线领袖；他能挡住德国多久，决定了库拉索的上限。

why.en: 34-year-old captain and the team's heartbeat — anchors midfield, drops to the back line, and takes every set piece.
why.zh: 34岁队长、全队心脏——坐镇中场、必要时退回后卫线，并主罚所有定位球。

why.en: Ex-Man Utd academy winger and Curaçao's marquee name; his dribbling is their main route to manufacture chances.
why.zh: 前曼联青训边锋、库拉索的招牌球星；他的盘带是球队制造机会的主要途径。

style.en: Reigning AFCON champions who play a physical, transition-heavy game built on athletic wingers, ball-winning midfielders and quick vertical breaks. Their strength is wide pace and individual quality on the flanks; the main weakness is a settled centre-forward and finishing, often leaving them dominant in possession but short on clinical end product.
style.zh: 卫冕非洲杯冠军，打法强硬、依赖快速攻防转换，核心是速度型边锋、抢断型中场和直接的纵向反击。强项在于两翼的速度和个人能力；主要短板是缺少稳定的中锋和把握机会的能力，常常控球占优却终结乏力。

en: Yan Diomande's pace down the flank — the breakout teenage RB Leipzig winger is their highest-valued asset and main x-factor in transition
Franck Kessié's engine in midfield — the 100-cap captain dictates tempo and is on penalties and set-piece duty
Whether Faé finds a reliable No.9: Wahi, Pépé and Guessand are all auditioning for the lone-striker role and goals have been hard to come by
zh: 关注严·迪奥曼德的边路速度——这位莱比锡新星是队内身价最高的球员，也是反击中的最大变量
关注弗兰克·凯西在中场的覆盖能力——这位百场队长掌控节奏，并负责点球和定位球
关注法埃能否找到稳定的中锋：瓦希、佩佩和盖桑都在竞争单箭头位置，进球荒一直困扰球队

why.en: 19-year-old Leipzig flier and the squad's most valuable player — direct, electric and the team's biggest transition threat.
why.zh: 19岁的莱比锡边锋，队内身价最高——直接、爆发力强，是球队反击中最大的威胁。

why.en: The 100-cap captain and midfield heartbeat — drives tempo, wins duels and takes the penalties.
why.zh: 百场队长、中场核心——掌控节奏、赢得对抗，并主罚点球。

why.en: Manchester United's tricky forward is the squad's standout dribbler and a constant chance-creator when introduced.
why.zh: 曼联的灵巧前锋是队内最出色的盘带手，登场后能持续创造机会。

note.zh: 主力中卫，对厄瓜多尔轮休

style.en: A defense-first, rigorously organised side built on one of the best back lines at the tournament — they conceded just five goals in 18 CONMEBOL qualifiers. They sit deep, win the ball through Caicedo and break with pace through Plata and Angulo; the weakness is a blunt, low-volume attack that can struggle to score.
style.zh: 以防守为根基、组织极其严密的球队，拥有本届赛事最出色的后防线之一——18场南美区预选赛仅丢5球。他们阵型回收，依靠卡塞多在中场断球，再通过普拉塔和安古洛的速度发动反击；弱点是进攻乏力、效率偏低，时常打不开局面。

en: Moisés Caicedo running the engine room — his ball-winning and progression set the tempo for everything Ecuador do
The centre-back pairing of Willian Pacho and Piero Hincapié, two of Europe's most coveted young defenders, anchoring an elite back line
Can the attack convert? Ecuador defend brilliantly but scored only 14 goals in qualifying, so chances will be scarce and precious
zh: 莫伊塞斯·卡塞多坐镇中场发动机——他的抢断与推进决定厄瓜多尔全队的节奏
由帕乔和因卡皮耶组成的中卫搭档，这两名欧洲最受追捧的年轻后卫支撑起顶级后防线
进攻能否破门？厄瓜多尔防守出色，但预选赛仅打入14球，机会稀少而珍贵

why.en: Imperious, ball-playing CB and a UCL winner with PSG — the rock of Ecuador's elite back line.
why.zh: 沉稳且善于出球的中卫，随巴黎圣日耳曼夺得欧冠——厄瓜多尔顶级后防的定海神针。

why.en: Chelsea's midfield engine and Ecuador's most valuable player ever — wins the ball and drives the team forward.
why.zh: 切尔西的中场引擎，厄瓜多尔史上身价最高的球员——抢断犀利，带动全队向前。

why.en: Direct, fast-rising winger whose dribbling gives Ecuador a different gear off the bench.
why.zh: 直接犀利、身价飙升的边锋，替补登场为厄瓜多尔提供另一种提速选择。

style.en: placeholder
style.zh: placeholder

en: The No.9 question: Koeman rotating an out-of-form Memphis Depay with the in-form Donyell Malen, who has scored freely since joining Roma.
Cody Gakpo cutting in from the left — his runs in behind and shooting are the Dutch attack's most consistent threat.
The midfield trio of De Jong, Gravenberch and Reijnders dictating tempo; if they are pressed off the ball, the Netherlands struggle to create.
zh: 中锋之争：科曼在状态低迷的德佩与状态火热的马伦之间轮换——马伦加盟罗马后进球如麻。
加克波从左路内切——他的身后插上和射门是荷兰进攻最稳定的威胁。
德容、格拉文贝赫与赖因德斯的中场三角掌控节奏；一旦被逼抢丢球，荷兰的创造力就会大打折扣。

why.en: Captain and defensive organiser — his reading of the game and aerial dominance hold a high line together.
why.zh: 队长兼防线指挥官——他的预判和制空能力撑起整条高位防线。

why.en: Breakout star — the Netherlands' most valuable player, a ball-winning, line-breaking metronome at the base of midfield.
why.zh: 爆发之星——荷兰身价最高的球员，中场后腰位置上拦截、推进、串联的节拍器。

why.en: The attack's main outlet — direct, two-footed and a constant goal threat cutting in from the left.
why.zh: 进攻的主要出口——直接、双脚均衡，从左路内切时始终是进球威胁。

why.en: Pushing to start over Depay after a prolific spell at Roma — the Dutch attack's form lift.
why.zh: 在罗马进球如麻后正力争取代德佩首发——荷兰进攻的状态提升点。

style.en: Moriyasu's 3-4-2-1 blends a disciplined, well-drilled back three with aggressive wing-backs, fast vertical transitions and a high collective press; technically excellent and superbly organized (only 3 goals conceded in 16 qualifiers), their main vulnerability is aerial/physical duels and a thinner spine after losing captain Wataru Endo to injury.
style.zh: 森保一的 3-4-2-1 以纪律严明的三中卫为基础，搭配压上的翼卫、快速的纵向转换和整体高位逼抢；技术细腻、组织出色（16 场预选赛仅失 3 球），但定位球与身体对抗是软肋，且失去队长远藤航后中场厚度下降。

en: The wing-backs are the engine: Doan inverting from the right and Nakamura overlapping left drive almost all of Japan's width and chance creation.
Kubo's duels with elite opponents — his close control and link-up with striker Ueda is the team's main route to unlock set defenses.
How the patched-up midfield (Sano + Kamada) copes without captain Endo against physical, set-piece-heavy opponents.
zh: 翼卫是发动机：堂安律从右路内收、中村敬斗左路套上，几乎包办了日本队的宽度与机会创造。
久保建英对阵强敌的一对一——他的护球与同前锋上田绮世的连线是破密集防守的主要手段。
失去队长远藤航后，佐野海舟＋鎌田大地的临时中场如何应对身体强壮、擅长定位球的对手。

why.en: Wears the iconic No.10 and is Japan's creative focal point — an inverted wing-back/winger whose dribbling and finishing carry the attack.
why.zh: 身披标志性 10 号，是日本进攻核心——内收型翼卫/边锋，盘带与终结撑起整条进攻线。

why.en: Japan's most valuable outfielder; a ball-winning engine stepping into the void left by captain Endo.
why.zh: 日本身价最高的非门将球员；抢断型中场发动机，填补队长远藤航留下的空缺。

why.en: Japan's marquee technician — close control and link play between the lines is the main route to break down set defenses.
why.zh: 日本头号技术核心——肋部的护球与连线，是撕开密集防守的主要途径。

style.en: Under Graham Potter, Sweden play a flexible back-three (3-4-1-2) built to unleash a frightening front two of Isak and Gyokeres, with wing-backs supplying width and a No.10 linking play. The firepower is elite, but a thin, low-pedigree defence and a midfield that can be overrun against possession sides are the clear weaknesses.
style.zh: 在波特（Graham Potter）执教下，瑞典采用灵活的三后卫体系（3-4-1-2），核心目的就是释放伊萨克与约克雷斯这对顶级锋线组合，由翼卫提供宽度、前腰串联进攻。锋线火力堪称世界级，但后防线偏薄且大牌不多，中场面对控球型球队时容易被压制，这是他们最明显的软肋。

en: The Isak-Gyokeres strike pairing: two genuine 20-plus-goal centre-forwards starting together, a rare luxury that makes Sweden lethal in transition.
Anthony Elanga's pace off the bench or wide right, stretching tired defences late in games.
Whether the makeshift back three (Hien, Lindelof, Lagerbielke) can survive against Netherlands and Japan's movement.
zh: 伊萨克与约克雷斯的双前锋组合：两名都能进20+球的真正中锋同时首发，这种奢侈配置让瑞典在转换进攻中极具杀伤力。
埃兰加（Elanga）的速度——无论替补登场还是打右路，都能在比赛末段冲击对手疲惫的防线。
临时拼凑的三后卫（希恩、林德洛夫、拉格比尔克）能否扛住荷兰和日本的跑动与穿插。

why.en: World-class finisher and Sweden's most valuable asset; can win a game on his own.
why.zh: 世界级射手，瑞典身价最高的球员，能凭一己之力改变比赛。

why.en: Relentless, physical goal machine whose movement and pressing set Sweden's attacking tone.
why.zh: 永不停歇的力量型进球机器，其跑位和逼抢奠定了瑞典的进攻基调。

why.en: Explosive pace and directness off the bench; a transition weapon against tiring defences.
why.zh: 替补登场的爆发力和直接突破，是面对体能下降防线时的转换利器。

note.zh: 潜力巨大的中场，能否首发取决于伤情
进攻型翼卫的轮换深度

style.en: A disciplined, defense-first side that prioritizes compact shape and structure over possession, springing fast transitions through their wide attackers. Resolute and hard to break down, but the main weakness is a chronic lack of cutting edge.
style.zh: 以防守为先的纪律型球队，重结构与紧凑的阵型而非控球，依靠边路球员打快速反击。整体稳固、难以攻破，但最大短板是缺乏致命一击。

en: Hannibal Mejbri carrying the ball through midfield — Tunisia's main spark and most valuable asset, capable of one moment of quality
Set pieces and a packed low block: Tunisia defend deep and look most dangerous from dead-ball situations
Whether the makeshift attack (no established elite striker) can finish the rare chances Lamouchi's pragmatic plan generates
zh: 看汉尼拔·梅杰布里的中场带球推进——他是球队的火花点，也是身价最高的球员，能凭一瞬间的个人能力改变比赛
定位球与密集防守：突尼斯深度防守、低位站桩，最具威胁的进攻往往来自定位球
锋线临时拼凑、缺少顶级中锋，关键看他们能否把拉穆希务实战术下少有的机会转化为进球

why.en: Captain and midfield heartbeat — the most-capped player who sets Tunisia's tempo and shields the back four.
why.zh: 队长兼中场核心，出场纪录保持者，掌控全队节奏并保护后防线。

why.en: Tunisia's most valuable player and creative spark — a press-resistant carrier who provides the team's rare moments of individual quality.
why.zh: 突尼斯身价最高、最具创造力的球员，抗压带球出色，是球队少有的个人能力闪光点。

why.en: Direct, in-form winger who earned a Celtic move — Tunisia's most dynamic dribbling threat off the bench.
why.zh: 状态火热、直接犀利的边锋，刚加盟凯尔特人，是替补席上最具突破威胁的攻击手。

style.en: A possession-leaning side built to feed Kevin De Bruyne in the No.10 slot, with Doku's one-on-one dribbling and Lukaku's hold-up play as the cutting edge. The double pivot of Onana and Tielemans gives control, but an aging, makeshift back line and slow transitions leave them exposed to pace on the break.
style.zh: 以传控为基础的打法，核心是把球喂给前腰位置的德布劳内，再靠多库的边路一对一突破和卢卡库的支点作用制造杀机。奥纳纳与蒂勒曼斯的双后腰提供控制力，但后防线老化、临时拼凑，转身偏慢，容易被快速反击打穿。

en: De Bruyne's final World Cup at 34 — his passing range and set pieces remain Belgium's chief creative source.
Jeremy Doku vs opposition full-backs: his acceleration can break any defense one-on-one (fitness a concern after a breathing scare).
Whether the patched-up center-back pairing (Theate plus rookie Nathan Ngoy) can survive against pace and crosses.
zh: 34岁的德布劳内最后一届世界杯——他的长传调度和定位球仍是比利时最主要的创造力来源。
多库对位对方边后卫：他的爆发力能在一对一中撕开任何防线（赛前有呼吸问题，体能状况存疑）。
临时拼凑的中卫组合（特亚特搭配新人纳坦·恩戈伊）能否扛住速度型前锋和传中冲击。

why.en: Elite shot-stopper and the spine of the team; can single-handedly steal results.
why.zh: 世界顶级门将，球队的中轴，能凭一己之力偷下比赛。

note.en: uncapped-level rookie thrust into the XI
note.zh: 近乎无大赛经验的新人被推上首发

why.en: Ball-winning engine who carries the midfield; recreates his Villa partnership with Tielemans.
why.zh: 中场抢断和推进发动机，与蒂勒曼斯复刻维拉的搭档关系。

why.en: Belgium's creative heartbeat; vision and set pieces unlock packed defenses on his last World Cup stage.
why.zh: 比利时的创造力心脏，视野与定位球能撬开密集防守，这是他最后一届世界杯舞台。

why.en: Explosive one-v-one dribbler who can strand any full-back; Belgium's biggest X-factor in transition.
why.zh: 爆发力极强的一对一突破手，能把任何边后卫钉在原地，是比利时转换进攻中最大的X因素。

style.en: Compact, disciplined and built to defend deep then break at speed, funneling everything through Salah on the right and Marmoush through the middle. The double pivot gives a solid base, but Egypt are heavily reliant on their two stars - if Salah and Marmoush are quiet, the attack creates little else.
style.zh: 防守纪律严明、阵型紧凑，擅长退守后快速反击，所有进攻都围绕右路的萨拉赫和中路的马尔穆什展开。双后腰提供稳固屏障，但球队过度依赖两位巨星——一旦萨拉赫和马尔穆什被冻结，进攻就缺乏其他办法。

en: Salah cutting in from the right onto his left foot - Egypt's single biggest goal threat and set-piece taker
Marmoush running the channels and leading counter-attacks; his pace stretches high defensive lines
How Egypt cope when forced to take the initiative - they are far more comfortable defending and countering than breaking down a packed block
zh: 萨拉赫从右路内切用左脚打门——埃及最大的得分威胁，也是定位球主罚者
马尔穆什的边路穿插和领衔反击；他的速度能撕扯对手的高位防线
当埃及被迫掌控比赛时如何应对——他们更擅长防守反击，面对密集防守时办法不多

why.en: Egypt's talisman and captain; one of the era's elite wingers and their main creative and goal source.
why.zh: 埃及的核心与队长，当今顶级边锋之一，是球队最主要的创造力与得分来源。

why.en: Egypt's most valuable player; pace, movement and finishing make him the spearhead of every counter.
why.zh: 埃及身价最高的球员；速度、跑位和终结能力让他成为每次反击的箭头。

style.en: A defensively organized, physical side that sits in compact lines, defends set pieces well and springs fast transitions, funneling direct service to target man Mehdi Taremi. Main weakness: a thin, domestic-heavy attack with little chance creation once the block is broken down.
style.zh: 组织严密、身体强硬的球队，防线收得很紧，定位球防守出色，靠快速反击把球直接喂给支点中锋塔雷米。主要短板：进攻线单薄、过度依赖国内联赛球员，一旦阵地战被对手压住就缺乏创造力。

en: Taremi as the lone reference point — almost every Iran chance runs through his hold-up play and finishing.
Set-piece duels: Iran are dangerous from dead balls and disciplined defending them, so watch the box on every corner.
Wide transitions through Jahanbakhsh and Mohebi after turnovers — the quickest route to Iran goals.
zh: 塔雷米作为唯一的进攻支点——伊朗几乎所有机会都依赖他的做球和把握能力。
定位球攻防：伊朗在死球进攻端有威胁、防守端也很自律，每个角球都要盯紧禁区。
由贾汉巴赫什和莫赫比在转换中打的边路反击——这是伊朗最快的进球路径。

why.en: Captain and creative outlet from the right — Iran's best technician and a proven big-tournament scorer.
why.zh: 队长兼右路创造点——伊朗技术最好的球员，大赛进球经验丰富。

why.en: Captain-class talisman and the squad's most valuable player; nearly every Iran goal threat runs through his hold-up and finishing.
why.zh: 球队的核心和身价最高的球员；伊朗几乎所有进攻威胁都来自他的做球和终结。

why.en: Spain-developed forward (Dennis Eckert Ayensa) who switched to Iran — Europe-based pace and movement off the bench.
why.zh: 在西班牙成长、后改披伊朗战袍的前锋（Dennis Eckert Ayensa）——替补登场带来欧洲化的速度与跑位。

style.en: A physical, well-drilled side that defends deep, stays compact and lives off set pieces, with almost everything funnelled toward getting aerial service to captain Chris Wood. The clear weakness is open-play creation: against an organized block they struggle to manufacture clear chances and can be passive without the ball.
style.zh: 身体强硬、纪律严明的球队,深度防守、保持紧凑,主要依靠定位球制造威胁,几乎所有进攻都为了把高球喂给队长克里斯·伍德。明显短板是阵地战创造力:面对组织严密的防线很难制造明确机会,无球时容易陷入被动。

en: Set-piece deliveries aimed at Chris Wood and the center-backs — New Zealand's most reliable route to a goal
Whether the double pivot of Joe Bell and Marko Stamenic can shield a modest back line against Belgium's and Iran's quality
Liberato Cacace's overlapping runs from left-back — one of the few open-play sources of width and crossing
zh: 瞄准伍德和中卫的定位球——新西兰最可靠的得分方式
乔·贝尔与斯塔门尼奇组成的双后腰能否在比利时、伊朗的实力面前保护住普通的后防线
卡卡切从左后卫位置的套上助攻——为数不多的边路宽度与传中来源

note.en: Veteran leader; scored OFC final winner
note.zh: 老将领袖,大洋洲决赛打入制胜球

why.en: Most attacking full-back; main source of width and crossing.
why.zh: 最具进攻性的边后卫,主要的边路宽度与传中来源。

note.en: European-tested pivot; distribution and ball recovery
note.zh: 经欧洲历练的中场,负责出球与抢断
伍德身后的主要组织点

why.en: Captain and all-time top scorer; a Premier League finisher and aerial threat the whole team plays for.
why.zh: 队长兼历史最佳射手,英超级的终结者与制空点,全队都在为他服务。

why.en: 21-year-old Premier League-pathway center-back, the future of the back line with strength and composure.
why.zh: 21岁、走英超路径的中卫,身体强硬且沉稳,是后防线的未来。

note.zh: 替补登场的速度型边锋
二号门将(伯恩茅斯所有)

style.en: Possession-dominant positional play built on a Rodri-anchored double pivot, relentless ball circulation and devastating one-v-one wingers in Lamine Yamal and Nico Williams. The main weakness is the lack of a classic No. 9 — Oyarzabal leads the line as a false-ish striker, so a low-block opponent who survives the wingers can frustrate them.
style.zh: 以控球和位置足球为核心，由罗德里坐镇的双后腰发动无休止的传导，两翼亚马尔与尼科·威廉姆斯的一对一突破极具杀伤力。最大短板是缺少传统中锋——奥亚萨瓦尔作为偏伪九的前锋顶在最前，因此能扛住边路冲击的密集防守球队有机会让西班牙陷入闷战。

en: Lamine Yamal vs the full-back: at 18 he is the world's most valuable player and Spain's go-to source of chaos on the right.
The Rodri-Pedri pivot dictating tempo — if they control midfield, Spain suffocate games through sheer possession.
How Spain break a low block without a target man: watch Oyarzabal's movement and late runners (Merino) arriving into the box.
zh: 亚马尔对位对方边后卫：18岁就成为全球身价最高球员，是西班牙右路制造混乱的最大武器。
罗德里与佩德里的双后腰掌控节奏——一旦他们控住中场，西班牙就用控球把比赛闷死。
没有传统中锋时如何打穿密集防守：留意奥亚萨瓦尔的跑位以及梅里诺等后插上球员涌入禁区。

why.en: 19-year-old ball-playing centre-back already valued at ~€130m — Spain's defensive future and a pressure-proof first passer.
why.zh: 19岁的出球型中卫身价已达约1.3亿欧元——西班牙后防的未来，抗压出球极其稳健。

why.en: Ballon d'Or-winning anchor who single-handedly sets Spain's tempo; the team is a different animal when he plays.
why.zh: 金球奖得主、球队节拍器，凭一己之力掌控西班牙的比赛节奏；他在与不在完全是两支球队。

why.en: The world's most valuable player at 18 — a fitness-permitting matchwinner who can decide knockout ties on his own.
why.zh: 18岁即为全球身价最高球员——只要伤愈复出，他一人就能左右淘汰赛走向。

note.zh: 另一中锋选项 / 替补奇兵

style.en: A disciplined, low-block 4-2-3-1 that defends in numbers, stays compact between the lines and springs forward on the wings through quick counters; biggest strength is organisation and team spirit on their debut, biggest weakness is a thin individual talent base (one top-five-league player) and limited goal threat against elite opponents.
style.zh: 以4-2-3-1低位防守为基础的纪律型球队，密集回防、保持中场紧凑，靠边路快速反击制造威胁；最大优势是首次参赛却拥有出色的组织性与团队凝聚力，最大短板是个人能力厚度不足（仅一名五大联赛球员），面对强队进攻火力有限。

en: Logan Costa (Villarreal) marshalling the back line — by far their highest-rated player and the man who must keep the score down against Spain.
Veteran captain Ryan Mendes, the all-time caps and goals record-holder, carrying their counter-attacking and set-piece threat at 36.
Whether the deep double pivot of Kevin Pina and Yannick Semedo can shield the box and frustrate possession sides — concede early and a blowout looms.
zh: 比利亚雷亚尔中卫Logan Costa坐镇后防——全队身价最高的球员，对阵西班牙时必须靠他稳住防线。
36岁老队长Ryan Mendes，国家队出场与进球纪录保持者，承担反击与定位球威胁。
Kevin Pina与Yannick Semedo组成的双后腰能否保护禁区、限制控球型对手——一旦早早失球，恐遭大比分。

why.en: The only top-five-league player in the squad; Villarreal centre-back who is Cape Verde's defensive anchor and most valuable asset.
why.zh: 全队唯一的五大联赛球员，比利亚雷亚尔中卫，是佛得角的防守支柱与最高身价资产。

why.en: Captain and national-team record-holder for caps (94) and goals (22); at 36 still the experienced head carrying their counter-attack.
why.zh: 队长，国家队出场（94场）与进球（22球）纪录保持者；36岁仍是带领反击的经验核心。

why.en: At 23 the squad's second-most-valuable player and a quick, modern full-back who offers a more attacking option down the right.
why.zh: 23岁，全队身价第二高，速度快的现代边后卫，提供更具攻击性的右路选择。

style.en: A compact 4-2-3-1 / 4-5-1 mid-block built almost entirely on Saudi Pro League players: deep defensive lines, physical pressing in midfield, fast vertical transitions and well-drilled set pieces. Strength is organisation and the individual quality of captain Salem Al-Dawsari; the main weakness is a lack of elite-level pace and a low-valued attack that struggles to create against teams that dominate possession (e.g. Spain).
style.zh: 以本土沙特联球员为班底的紧凑型 4-2-3-1 / 4-5-1 中场防守体系：防线压得很低，中场强调身体对抗与逼抢，靠快速直传打反击，定位球演练充分。强项是整体组织性和队长萨勒姆·达瓦萨里的个人能力；短板是缺乏顶级速度，锋线身价偏低，面对控球强队（如西班牙）很难创造机会。

en: Salem Al-Dawsari (No. 10, captain) — the 'Argentina-slayer' from 2022 and the team's only consistent game-breaker; almost all chances run through his left foot.
Set pieces and the low block — Saudi will sit deep and look to nick points from dead balls and counters, especially in the must-win-style game vs Cabo Verde.
Saud Abdulhamid (No. 12) — the lone Europe-based player (RC Lens) and most valuable man; his overlapping runs are the main source of width.
zh: 萨勒姆·达瓦萨里（10 号，队长）——2022 年掀翻阿根廷的功臣，全队唯一稳定的破局点，几乎所有机会都要靠他的左脚。
定位球与低位防守——沙特会摆大巴，指望靠死球和反击偷分，尤其是对阵佛得角这场必须拿分的比赛。
绍德·阿卜杜勒哈米德（12 号）——全队唯一旅欧球员（朗斯）兼身价最高者，他的套上助攻是球队边路宽度的主要来源。

note.en: Starts opener as Al-Aqidi is injured
note.zh: 因阿基迪伤缺而首发揭幕战

why.en: Only Europe-based player and the squad's most valuable man; key source of attacking width.
why.zh: 全队唯一旅欧球员、身价最高，是进攻宽度的关键来源。

why.en: Youngest outfield starter and the team's creative engine; turns 23 at the tournament with the highest upside.
why.zh: 最年轻的首发球员、全队的创造力发动机，赛事期间年满 23 岁，最具上升空间。

why.en: Captain and talisman; scored the winner that beat Argentina in 2022 and is the team's joint-top WC scorer.
why.zh: 队长兼灵魂人物，2022 年攻入绝杀阿根廷的进球，是球队世界杯并列最佳射手。

note.en: First-choice GK when fit (muscle injury for opener)
note.zh: 健康时的头号门将（揭幕战肌肉伤缺）

style.en: Bielsa's Uruguay press man-to-man with a high line and attack in fast vertical transitions, with overlapping full-backs acting as auxiliary wingers and Valverde driving box-to-box. The strength is midfield athleticism and aggression; the weakness is a fragile, exposed back line when the press is broken, plus a thin, goal-light pool of pure strikers.
style.zh: 比尔萨的乌拉圭采用全场人盯人高压、防线压得很高，依靠快速纵向反击进攻，边后卫前插当边锋使用，巴尔韦德负责中场全覆盖。强项是中场的跑动与侵略性；弱点是高压被打穿后防线单薄、易被反制，且锋线纯射手储备稀薄、进球点不足。

en: Whether the high line survives against pace — when the press is bypassed, Uruguay's defenders are left in big one-on-one spaces
Federico Valverde's box-to-box engine: he covers both penalty areas and is the team's true tempo-setter and leader
Darwin Nunez's finishing — explosive and decisive on his day but streaky, so his conversion rate can swing whole matches
zh: 高位防线能否扛住对手速度——一旦高压被绕过，乌拉圭后卫会被拉出大片单防空间
巴尔韦德的中场覆盖：他往返两个禁区，是真正的节奏掌控者与领袖
达尔文·努涅斯的把握机会能力——状态好时爆发力十足、一锤定音，但起伏大，转化率高低能直接左右整场比赛

why.en: Uruguay's best player and de facto leader — a relentless box-to-box engine who sets the tempo and covers both ends.
why.zh: 乌拉圭头号球星与实际领袖——往返两个禁区的中场发动机，掌控节奏、攻防兼顾。

why.en: Explosive, direct No.9 who stretches high lines and is Uruguay's main goal threat, despite a streaky, frustrating finishing record.
why.zh: 爆发力强、直接的9号，能撕扯对手高位防线，是乌拉圭主要的得分点，尽管把握机会忽冷忽热。

why.en: Reigning South American playmaker-of-form at Flamengo; Uruguay's most inventive passer and set-piece creator off the bench.
why.zh: 弗拉门戈正值巅峰的组织核心；乌拉圭最具创造力的传球者与定位球策划人，替补登场即能改变比赛。

note.zh: 老将门将，第五次参加世界杯创纪录

style.en: Deschamps' France is a counter-punching machine: a deep, athletic double pivot shields a world-class back line while elite individual quality (Mbappe, Dembele, Olise) wins games in transition. Pragmatic and tournament-tested, but can look passive and labored when forced to break down a packed low block.
style.zh: 德尚的法国是一支反击机器:深站位、跑动充沛的双后腰保护着世界级后防线,而顶级个人能力(姆巴佩、登贝莱、奥利塞)在转换进攻中决定比赛。务实且大赛经验丰富,但在被迫破解密集防守时,常显得被动而吃力。

en: Mbappe leading the line and drifting left — his run-in-behind and finishing remain France's primary win condition
France's transition speed: win the ball deep, then Dembele/Olise/Mbappe break in a 3-second sprint to goal
Whether Deschamps can solve the creativity gap against a low block — watch for Doue, Cherki or Olise unlocking it
zh: 姆巴佩担任锋线并向左路游弋——他的反越位插上和终结能力仍是法国的首要取胜手段
法国的转换速度:深位置抢断后,登贝莱、奥利塞、姆巴佩在三秒内冲刺破门
德尚能否解决破解密集防守时的创造力短板——留意杜埃、谢尔基或奥利塞的破局

why.en: France's chief creator from the right — elite dribbling, set-pieces and a contract-year value surge to ~€150m.
why.zh: 法国右路的头号创造者——顶级盘带、定位球能力,身价飙升至约1.5亿欧元。

why.en: Captain, talisman and the world's most valuable player — his pace and finishing are France's entire win condition.
why.zh: 队长、核心、全球身价最高的球员——他的速度和终结能力就是法国的取胜根本。

why.en: Reigning Ballon d'Or favorite after a monster PSG season; two-footed, unplayable in transition, leads the line here.
why.zh: 在巴黎圣日耳曼度过爆发赛季后成为金球奖热门;双脚均衡,转换进攻中无法防守,在此担任锋线支点。

why.en: France's low-block breaker off the bench — a genuine No.10's vision Deschamps lacks in the starting XI.
why.zh: 法国替补席上的密集防守破解者——拥有首发阵容所缺的真正10号球员视野。

style.en: Senegal are a physically dominant, defensively organized side built on a watertight back line and powerful ball-winning midfield, springing into transition through pacey wide forwards. Their main weaknesses are an aging spine and inconsistent chance creation when forced to break down deep blocks.
style.zh: 塞内加尔身体素质出众、防守组织严密,依靠稳固的后防线和强硬的拦截型中场,再通过速度型边锋打反击。主要短板是核心阵容老化,以及面对深度防守时进攻创造力时好时坏。

en: Edouard Mendy keeps the No.1 shirt from Yehvann Diouf but still likely starts in goal - watch the goalkeeper pecking order
Sadio Mane (10) drifting in from the left to combine with striker Nicolas Jackson
The double-pivot of Idrissa Gueye and Pape Gueye smothering opponents in midfield transitions
zh: 1号球衣给了新人迪乌夫,但门将首发大概率仍是门迪,值得关注门将顺位
萨内(10号)从左路内切,与中锋杰克逊做配合
双后腰伊德里萨·盖伊和帕佩·盖伊在中场转换中的绞杀能力

note.en: captain, leader of the back line

why.en: 23-year-old engine of the midfield, drives box-to-box and is Senegal's most sought-after prospect.
why.zh: 23岁的中场发动机,前后覆盖大,是塞内加尔最炙手可热的新星。

why.en: Senegal's most valuable player; a direct, two-footed dribbler who unlocks deep defenses.
why.zh: 塞内加尔身价最高的球员,左右脚均衡、突破直接,能撕开密集防守。

why.en: Fast, physical centre-forward on loan at Bayern who stretches back lines and finishes transitions.
why.zh: 租借拜仁的快速力量型中锋,能拉扯后卫线并终结反击。

why.en: 34-year-old talisman and captain in spirit; still world-class touch, vision and big-game leadership.
why.zh: 34岁的精神领袖与核心,触球、视野和大赛领导力依旧顶级。

why.en: Searing pace and end product; was decisive for Crystal Palace and can win a game in minutes.
why.zh: 速度炸裂且有效率,曾是水晶宫的关键先生,几分钟内就能决定比赛。

en: Zidane Iqbal (ex-Man Utt academy, now Utrecht) is the lone creative hub — Iraq's attack runs almost entirely through his passing range, so watch whether opponents shut him down.
Set pieces and Amir Al-Ammari's delivery: he and Ali Jasim take the corners/free-kicks and Al-Ammari/Aymen Hussein the penalties — likely Iraq's best route to a goal against superior sides.
Aymen Hussein's aerial duels — the 30-year-old physical target man with 90+ caps and 30+ goals is the focal point for direct balls and second-phase chances.
zh: 齐丹·伊克巴尔（前曼联青训、现效力乌德勒支）是唯一的创造核心——伊拉克进攻几乎全靠他的传球调度，要看对手能否将他冻结。
定位球与阿米尔·阿尔-阿玛里的传中：他和阿里·贾西姆主罚角球/任意球，阿玛里和艾门·侯赛因主罚点球——这很可能是伊拉克对阵强队最现实的得分途径。
艾门·侯赛因的争顶：这位30岁、90+出场、30+进球的高中锋是长传冲吊和二点进攻的支点。

why.en: Veteran captain back from injury, earning his 103rd cap; his organization and shot-stopping anchor a team that will defend for long spells.
why.zh: 老将队长伤愈回归，将迎来第103次出场；他的组织指挥和扑救是这支需要长时间防守的球队的定海神针。

why.en: Midfield string-puller and Iraq's main set-piece and penalty taker — scored the decisive playoff penalty that sent them to the World Cup.
why.zh: 中场组织核心，也是伊拉克主要的定位球与点球主罚者——正是他罚进关键附加赛点球，将球队送进世界杯。

why.en: Manchester United academy graduate and the squad's most technical player; his vision and passing range are Iraq's primary route to creating chances.
why.zh: 曼联青训出品、全队技术最好的球员；他的视野与传球调度是伊拉克创造机会的首要来源。

why.en: First Iraqi to play in the Premier League and the squad's most valuable attacker; scored the opener vs Bolivia in the qualifying playoff.
why.zh: 首位征战英超的伊拉克球员，也是阵中身价最高的攻击手；在对阵玻利维亚的资格赛附加赛中打入首球。

note.zh: 有创造力的边锋，意甲球队拥有所有权
全队身价最高；有速度的边路选择

style.en: Direct, vertical football built around feeding Haaland fast and freeing Odegaard as the creative hub; pace and flair out wide through Nusa. Strength is a world-class attacking spine, but a modestly-valued, inexperienced back line and the lack of a proven elite goalkeeper are genuine weaknesses at this level.
style.zh: 踢法直接、强调纵向推进，核心是尽快把球喂给哈兰德、解放厄德高担任组织中枢，边路靠努萨的速度与灵性。最大优势是世界级的攻击中轴，但身价偏低、缺乏大赛经验的后防线，加上没有公认的顶级门将，是这一级别上实打实的短板。

en: Haaland at his first major tournament — Norway's all-time top scorer arrives off 16 qualifying goals and is the team's whole gravitational center.
Odegaard's free role: when the Arsenal captain is on song he dictates everything; shut him down and Norway's creativity dries up.
Whether a cheap, big-club-short back line can hold up against France/Senegal-level attackers — the gap between Norway's front and back ends is huge.
zh: 哈兰德的首次大赛——挪威历史第一射手，预选赛狂轰16球，整支球队都围绕他运转。
厄德高的自由角色：这位阿森纳队长状态在线时能掌控全场；一旦被锁死，挪威的创造力就枯竭。
廉价且缺大牌的后防线能否顶住法国、塞内加尔级别的攻击线——挪威前后场的实力落差极大。

why.en: Arsenal's title-winning captain and Norway's creative engine — the free-role conductor everything runs through.
why.zh: 刚带领阿森纳夺冠的队长，挪威的创造力发动机——所有进攻都由他这个自由人来调度。

why.en: Norway's all-time top scorer and one of the planet's best finishers; 16 goals in qualifying, the team's entire reason for hope.
why.zh: 挪威历史第一射手、地球上最强终结者之一；预选赛打进16球，是全队希望所在。

why.en: Explosive 20-year-old winger primed for a breakout tournament with his pace and dribbling.
why.zh: 20岁的爆点边锋，凭借速度和盘带，正待在大赛上一鸣惊人。

style.en: Reigning champions who blend a compact, organized mid-block with explosive transitions; Messi is the creative hub and free man, supported by a powerful, ball-winning midfield. Main weakness is an aging defensive spine that can be exposed for pace in behind.
style.zh: 卫冕冠军，打法是紧凑有序的中场区域防守加上犀利的快速反击；梅西是自由人和创造力核心，身后是抢断能力极强的强力中场。主要弱点是后防线老化，容易被身后的速度打穿。

en: Messi in his final World Cup — still the free man pulling all the strings in the final third
Whether the veteran centre-back pairing (Otamendi, Romero) can handle pace over the heat of a North American summer
The race for the third forward slot — Almada, Simeone or Nico Gonzalez changes the team's balance
zh: 梅西的最后一届世界杯——依旧是前场牵线搭桥的自由人
老将中卫组合（奥塔门迪、罗梅罗）能否在北美夏季高温下应对对手的速度冲击
第三个锋线位置之争——阿尔马达、小西蒙尼还是尼科·冈萨雷斯，将改变全队平衡

why.en: Penalty-shootout specialist and big-game goalkeeper who was decisive in the 2022 title run.
why.zh: 点球大战专家、大场面门将，2022年夺冠征程中的关键先生。

why.en: Two-way engine of the midfield who controls tempo and links defense to Messi seamlessly.
why.zh: 攻防一体的中场发动机，掌控节奏，无缝连接后场与梅西。

why.en: Captain and creative free man in his final World Cup — still the team's decisive match-winner.
why.zh: 队长、自由创造核心，最后一届世界杯，仍是球队决定胜负的关键。

why.en: Breakout playmaker tipped as the long-term heir to Messi's creative role.
why.zh: 横空出世的组织者，被看作梅西创造力角色的长期接班人。

style.en: Possession-minded but transition-deadly: Petkovic's Algeria build patiently through technical midfielders then unleash quick, direct attacks via the flanks and Amoura's running. The strength is an abundance of European-honed attacking talent; the weakness is an aging, injury-prone defence that can be exposed by pace and set pieces.
style.zh: 阿尔及利亚崇尚控球，但反击致命：佩特科维奇让球队通过技术型中场耐心组织，再借助边路和阿穆拉的跑动打出快速直接的攻势。强点是大量在欧洲历练的进攻人才，弱点是后防线老化且伤病缠身，容易被速度和定位球打穿。

en: Mohamed Amoura's pace in behind — Algeria's qualifying top scorer is the focal point of every counter-attack
Whether 35-year-old captain Mahrez can still deliver moments of magic from the right against elite opposition
The back line under pressure: Bensebaini's fitness and an aging defence make set pieces and quick transitions Algeria's biggest vulnerability
zh: 阿穆拉的身后速度——预选赛最佳射手是每次反击的核心
35岁队长马赫雷斯能否在右路面对强敌仍送出灵光一现
后防承压：本塞拜尼的伤情加上老化的防线，让定位球和快速转换成为阿尔及利亚最大软肋

note.en: Son of Zinedine; recovered from broken jaw
note.zh: 齐达内之子，刚从下颌骨折中康复
队史出场王，119次国家队出场

note.en: Leader at the back; ankle injury doubt
note.zh: 后防领袖，脚踝伤情存疑

why.en: Treble-winning Man City full-back, the squad's most valuable defender and a relentless overlapping threat
why.zh: 曼城三冠王边后卫，全队身价最高的后卫，套边助攻威胁不断

why.en: Captain and talisman; 116 caps, still Algeria's set-piece and final-third creator at 35
why.zh: 队长与精神领袖，116次出场，35岁仍是定位球与前场创造力来源

why.en: Qualifying top scorer (10 goals in 8); blistering pace makes him the attack's focal point
why.zh: 预选赛最佳射手（8场10球），极致速度使其成为进攻核心

why.en: At 20 the squad's most valuable player (€45m); a Leverkusen-groomed creator who is Algeria's future and a game-changing sub
why.zh: 20岁却是全队身价最高（4500万欧），勒沃库森培养的组织核心，阿尔及利亚的未来与改变比赛的替补

note.zh: 奇兵替补 / 未来主力

note.en: Direct wide threat off the bench
note.zh: 边路直接突破的替补威胁
覆盖大、攻防兼备的中场选项

note.en: Full-back cover, can start if Mandi pushes inside
note.zh: 边后卫替补，曼迪内收时可顶上首发

style.en: Rangnick's textbook gegenpressing side: aggressive high pressing, fast vertical transitions and relentless collective work-rate, built on a German-school RB Leipzig spine. Main weakness is goal threat in the final third, leaning on a 37-year-old Arnautovic, plus tournament inexperience on their first World Cup since 1998.
style.zh: 兰尼克打造的典型高位逼抢球队：全场高强度压迫、快速纵向转换、整体跑动量极大，骨架建立在RB莱比锡体系之上。短板是锋线终结能力不足，过度依赖37岁的阿瑙托维奇，加上1998年以来首次参加世界杯、大赛经验欠缺。

en: The midfield engine room of Xaver Schlager and Nicolas Seiwald pressing in waves to force turnovers high up the pitch
Captain David Alaba marshalling the back four and stepping into build-up from centre-back
Can the veteran duo of Arnautovic (37) and Sabitzer (98+ caps) still provide the goals and creativity in the heat of North America
zh: 中场发动机沙拉格与塞瓦尔德成波次逼抢，在前场制造抢断
队长阿拉巴坐镇后防线、从中卫位置参与组织出球
老将组合阿瑙托维奇（37岁）与萨比策（98+次国家队出场）能否在北美高温下继续贡献进球与创造力

why.en: Bayern's relentless engine deployed as an overlapping right-back; covers vast ground and sets Austria's pressing tempo.
why.zh: 拜仁的不知疲倦发动机被改造成插上的右后卫，覆盖范围极广，定下奥地利的逼抢节奏。

why.en: Captain and Real Madrid leader; his composure on the ball and reading of the game anchor the whole back line.
why.zh: 队长兼皇马领袖，出球冷静、阅读比赛能力强，是整条后防线的定海神针。

why.en: Austria's creative hub at No.10, nearing 100 caps; carries the chance-creation and set-piece threat.
why.zh: 奥地利的创造力核心，司职10号位、即将达成百场国家队里程碑，承担创造机会与定位球威胁。

why.en: Vice-captain and all-time record scorer; physical focal point who holds up play and leads the line at 37.
why.zh: 副队长兼国家队历史最佳射手，37岁仍是支点型中锋，背身做球、带领锋线。

why.en: At 20 the most valuable outfield talent in the squad; a press-resistant playmaker who can change a game off the bench.
why.zh: 年仅20岁，是阵中身价最高的非门将球员，抗压组织型中场，可从替补席改变比赛。

style.en: Ultra-compact, defence-first debutants who set up in a nominal 3-4-3 that collapses into a 5-2-3 or 5-4-1 block out of possession, soaking pressure and springing fast counters through Mousa Al-Tamari. Strength is organisation and a tireless low block; the weakness is a thin, domestically-based squad with little top-level pedigree and limited possession quality against elite opponents.
style.zh: 约旦是世界杯首秀球队，打法极度紧凑、防守优先：名义上的3-4-3在丢球后收缩成5-2-3甚至5-4-1的密集防线，吸收压力后通过塔马里发动快速反击。强项是纪律性和不知疲倦的低位防守；弱点是阵容单薄、几乎全部来自国内联赛，面对强敌时控球质量和大赛经验都明显不足。

en: Mousa Al-Tamari (the 'Jordanian Messi') on the counter — Jordan's only top-five-league player and the source of almost all their creativity and transition threat.
How long the back five holds: Jordan will defend deep and narrow against Argentina, Algeria and Austria, so watch the low block's discipline and set-piece defending.
Ali Olwan leading the line alone — with striker Yazan Al-Naimat injured out, Jordan need their AFC-qualifying top scorer to convert rare chances.
zh: 塔马里（绰号‘约旦梅西’）的反击——他是约旦唯一效力欧洲五大联赛的球员，几乎承担全部创造力和反击威胁。
五后卫防线能撑多久：面对阿根廷、阿尔及利亚、奥地利，约旦将深度收缩防守，重点看低位防线的纪律性和定位球防守。
独自顶在锋线的奥尔万——主力前锋纳伊马特伤缺，约旦需要这位亚洲区预选赛射手王抓住为数不多的机会。

why.en: Jordan's talisman and only top-five-league player — a Ligue 1 winger ('Jordanian Messi') whose dribbling and end product (7 goals, 11 assists for Rennes) carry the whole attack.
why.zh: 约旦的核心、唯一效力五大联赛的球员——法甲边锋（‘约旦梅西’），盘带和终结能力（雷恩7球11助攻）支撑起全队进攻。

why.en: Joint AFC-qualifying top scorer with 9 goals; with Al-Naimat injured he is the lone striker Jordan must rely on to finish scarce chances.
why.zh: 亚洲区预选赛并列射手王（9球）；纳伊马特伤缺后，他是约旦必须依靠的单箭头，负责把握稀少的机会。

style.en: Possession-based 4-3-3 built around arguably the best midfield in the world (Vitinha, João Neves, Bruno Fernandes) with fluid front-line rotation and Nuno Mendes bombing forward at left-back. Strength is positional control and elite individual quality; the main weakness is a thin, aging central-defensive group and reliance on a 41-year-old Ronaldo as the focal point.
style.zh: 以控球为基础的4-3-3，围绕可能是全世界最强的中场（维蒂尼亚、若昂·内维斯、布鲁诺·费尔南德斯）构建，前场换位灵活，努诺·门德斯从左后卫不断前插。优势在于位置控制和顶级个人能力；主要隐患是中后卫老龄且厚度不足，以及过度依赖已41岁的C罗作为进攻支点。

en: Can the Vitinha–João Neves–Bruno Fernandes midfield dictate every match? It is the engine that makes Portugal a title favorite.
Cristiano Ronaldo at 41 chasing a record sixth World Cup — his finishing and minutes-management will be a storyline every game.
Nuno Mendes overlapping from left-back: the best left-back at the tournament drives much of Portugal's attacking width.
zh: 维蒂尼亚—若昂·内维斯—布鲁诺·费尔南德斯的中场能否场场掌控比赛？这是葡萄牙争冠的发动机。
41岁的C罗冲击纪录性的第六次世界杯——他的把握机会能力和出场时间分配是每场比赛的看点。
努诺·门德斯从左后卫前插：本届最佳左后卫，葡萄牙进攻宽度的主要来源。

why.en: Widely rated the best left-back at the tournament — relentless overlaps and elite 1v1 defending.
why.zh: 公认本届最佳左后卫——不知疲倦的套边前插加上顶级的一对一防守。

why.en: The metronome of PSG's treble side and Portugal's most valuable player — controls tempo and breaks lines from deep.
why.zh: 巴黎三冠王的节拍器、葡萄牙身价最高的球员——掌控节奏，从后场用传球撕开防线。

why.en: Captain at 41 chasing a record sixth World Cup — still Portugal's penalty-box focal point and emotional leader.
why.zh: 41岁的队长冲击纪录性的第六次世界杯——仍是葡萄牙禁区内的支点和精神领袖。

style.en: A compact, transition-focused side that defends in a tight mid-block and springs fast, direct counters down the channels for Wissa and Mbuku; aerially strong on set pieces through captain Mbemba. Main weakness is a lack of creativity to break down deep blocks and thin depth once the back line is stretched.
style.zh: 防守紧凑、主打防反的球队:以中场密集防守站位为基础,通过边路快速直传打反击,喂球给维萨和姆布库;定位球上凭借队长姆本巴的制空能力很有威胁。主要短板是阵地战缺乏创造力、难以打穿密集防守,且后防一旦被拉开后替补深度不足。

en: DR Congo's only realistic route to a result is fast transition — watch Wissa and Mbuku break in behind before opponents settle.
Set-piece duels: Mbemba is a genuine aerial threat at both ends from corners and free-kicks.
The striker question — veteran Bakambu starts for hold-up play, but the quicker Mayele off the bench changes the team's verticality.
zh: 刚果(金)唯一现实的取分方式是快速反击:留意维萨和姆布库在对手落位前的身后插上。
定位球对抗:姆本巴在两端的角球与任意球中都是真正的制空威胁。
锋线选择:老将巴坎布首发负责支点策应,而替补登场的速度型前锋马耶莱会改变球队的纵向冲击力。

why.en: Premier League right-back whose recovery pace and 1v1 defending are DR Congo's best tool against elite wingers.
why.zh: 英超级别右后卫,回追速度和一对一防守是刚果(金)对抗顶级边锋的最大依靠。

why.en: Captain and most-capped player (107); leads the back line and is a two-way set-piece threat.
why.zh: 队长兼出场纪录保持者(107次),后防领袖,定位球两端都具威胁。

why.en: At 21 the squad's most valuable player (€35m); a dynamic box-to-box engine who screens the defense and drives transitions.
why.zh: 年仅21岁却是全队身价最高(3500万欧):动力充沛的B2B中场,既能保护防线又能发动反击。

why.en: The squad's most dangerous attacker; pace, finishing and Premier League pedigree make him DR Congo's go-to outlet in transition.
why.zh: 全队最具威胁的攻击手:速度、终结能力加英超履历,是刚果(金)反击中的首要出球点。

why.en: Quicker, more vertical than Bakambu; CAF Champions League-winning forward who stretches tiring defenses off the bench.
why.zh: 比巴坎布更快、更具纵深冲击;非冠联赛冠军前锋,替补登场专打体能下降的防线。

style.en: Under Fabio Cannavaro, Uzbekistan are a disciplined, deep-and-compact counter-attacking side built on a back three anchored by Man City's Khusanov; their strength is organization and set-piece threat, while their weakness is creating sustained chances against teams that sit deep, leaving them over-reliant on Shomurodov and Fayzullaev for moments of quality.
style.zh: 在卡纳瓦罗执教下，乌兹别克斯坦打的是纪律严明、阵型紧凑的防守反击，以曼城后卫胡萨诺夫领衔的三中卫为支柱。球队的强项是防守组织和定位球威胁，弱点则是面对收缩防守的对手时缺乏持续创造机会的能力，进攻过度依赖肖穆罗多夫和法伊祖拉耶夫的个人灵光。

en: Abdukodir Khusanov vs elite attackers — the €50m Man City defender is Asia's most valuable player and the spine of the whole team
Set-piece and counter situations — this is where a low-block Uzbekistan can punish bigger names like Portugal and Colombia
Eldor Shomurodov's finishing — the 44-goal captain must convert the few clear chances they manufacture
zh: 胡萨诺夫对位顶级前锋——这位身价5000万欧的曼城后卫是亚洲最贵球员，也是全队的脊梁
定位球和反击时刻——低位防守的乌兹别克斯坦正是靠这些机会去偷袭葡萄牙、哥伦比亚等强队
队长肖穆罗多夫的把握机会能力——这位打进44球的射手必须抓住为数不多的清晰机会

why.en: €50m Man City centre-back — by far Uzbekistan's and Asia's most valuable player, with elite recovery pace.
why.zh: 身价5000万欧的曼城中卫，乌兹别克斯坦乃至全亚洲身价最高的球员，拥有顶级回追速度。

why.en: 22-year-old creative spark and the team's future — chief chance-creator behind Shomurodov.
why.zh: 22岁的创造力核心、球队的未来，是肖穆罗多夫身后的头号机会制造者。

why.en: Captain and all-time top scorer (44 goals) with Serie A pedigree — the finisher everything funnels through.
why.zh: 队长兼历史最佳射手（44球），有意甲履历，是全队进攻的终结点。

note.zh: 替补奇兵前锋（国家队25球）

style.en: A pragmatic, well-drilled 4-3-3 that flips to a 4-2-3-1 when defending; under Lorenzo they conceded just 15 goals in 18 qualifiers, blending defensive discipline with quick transitions. Strength is a deep, technical attacking core (Díaz, James, Ríos) feeding off solid back-line organization; the main weakness is an aging, finishing-light center-forward situation and reliance on a 34-year-old playmaker to set the tempo.
style.zh: 务实且训练有素的4-3-3，防守时切换成4-2-3-1；洛伦索治下18场预选赛只丢15球，把防守纪律和快速反击结合得很好。强点是技术细腻、层次丰富的进攻核心（迪亚斯、哈梅斯、里奥斯）建立在稳固的后防组织之上；隐患是中锋偏老、把握机会能力一般，且过度依赖34岁的哈梅斯掌控节奏。

en: Luis Díaz vs the right-back: Bayern's left winger is Colombia's elite carrier and their most likely match-winner in transition.
Whether 34-year-old captain James Rodríguez (now in MLS) can still dictate tempo over 90 minutes against high-pressing sides.
The No.9 question: starter Jhon Córdoba (33) vs in-form Sporting striker Luis Suárez, who scored 28 league goals in 2025/26 and is pushing hard for the spot.
zh: 路易斯·迪亚斯对位边后卫：拜仁左边锋是哥伦比亚最强的持球推进点，也是反击中最可能的胜负手。
34岁队长哈梅斯（现效力MLS）能否在面对高位逼抢时打满全场、依旧掌控节奏。
9号之争：首发科尔多巴（33岁）对阵状态火热的葡超射手路易斯·苏亚雷斯——后者2025/26赛季联赛打入28球，正强势冲击首发。

why.en: Box-to-box engine who broke out at the 2024 Copa America and now anchors midfield at Benfica.
why.zh: 覆盖全场的中场发动机，2024美洲杯一战成名，如今在本菲卡坐镇中场。

why.en: Captain, all-time Colombia WC scorer and chief creator — the team's tempo runs through his left foot.
why.zh: 队长、哥伦比亚世界杯历史射手王兼第一组织者——全队节奏系于他的左脚。

why.en: Colombia's marquee star: a relentless Bayern left winger and the most valuable, most dangerous player in the squad.
why.zh: 哥伦比亚的招牌球星：拜仁不知疲倦的左边锋，全队身价最高、威胁最大的人。

why.en: Scored 28 league goals for Sporting in 2025/26 — Colombia's hottest finisher and a genuine threat to start over Córdoba.
why.zh: 2025/26赛季为葡萄牙竞技打入28粒联赛进球——哥伦比亚手感最热的终结者，有望取代科尔多巴首发。

note.en: In-form striker, pushing for a start
note.zh: 状态火热的射手，正争夺首发

style.en: Tuchel has built a structured, control-oriented 4-2-3-1 with a double pivot of Rice and Anderson shielding a back four, letting Bellingham, Saka and Rashford attack and Kane lead the line. England are deep in talent and defensively organized, but can lack tempo and creativity in slow, low-block games where they over-rely on individual moments.
style.zh: 图赫尔打造了一支结构化、控制导向的 4-2-3-1：赖斯与安德森组成双后腰保护后防线，放贝林厄姆、萨卡、拉什福德前压进攻，凯恩担任支点。英格兰阵容深度极佳、防守纪律性强，但在面对密集防守的慢节奏比赛中容易缺乏速度与创造力，过度依赖球星个人灵光一现。

en: Whether Bellingham and Saka can unlock low blocks when England dominate possession but struggle to break teams down.
Tuchel's full-backs: Reece James bombing forward on the right while makeshift left-back Nico O'Reilly inverts.
Harry Kane's dual role - top scorer and deep playmaker dropping in to link the attack.
zh: 当英格兰控球占优却难以打破密集防守时，贝林厄姆和萨卡能否撕开对手低位防线。
图赫尔的边后卫体系：里斯·詹姆斯右路压上助攻，临时左后卫尼科·奥莱利则内收。
哈里·凯恩的双重角色——既是头号射手，又回撤组织串联进攻。

why.en: Tuchel's midfield anchor - elite ball-winner who also bursts forward and scores; the team's true engine.
why.zh: 图赫尔中场的定海神针——顶级抢断手，又能前插破门，是球队真正的发动机。

why.en: England's most reliable wide threat - €110m winger who beats his man and delivers in big games.
why.zh: 英格兰最稳定的边路威胁——身价 1.1 亿欧的边锋，能过人能在大赛交付。

why.en: The squad's most valuable player and creative heartbeat; arrives late in the box and produces decisive moments.
why.zh: 全队身价最高、创造力核心——后插上抢点，关键时刻总能制造致命一击。

style.en: Possession-based, midfield-controlled football built around veteran technicians who slow the game, keep the ball and starve opponents of rhythm before striking through quality. Greatest strength is midfield passing and tournament know-how; main weakness is an ageing spine (Modric 40, Perisic 37) that can be overrun by pace and high pressing, plus a thin elite striker pool.
style.zh: 以控球和中场掌控为核心,围绕经验丰富的技术型老将,放慢节奏、牢牢控制皮球,在拖垮对手节奏后用质量制胜。最大优势是中场传控和大赛经验;主要弱点是中轴线老化(莫德里奇40岁、佩里西奇37岁),容易被速度和高位逼抢冲垮,且缺乏顶级中锋。

en: Luka Modric at 40 in likely his last World Cup — still the metronome dictating Croatia's tempo from deep
The Kovacic-Modric double pivot vs high-pressing opponents: if they get time on the ball Croatia controls the game; if pressed hard they can creak
Young defenders Gvardiol (£70m) and Luka Vuskovic flanking the back line — pace and ball-carrying that contrasts the veteran midfield
zh: 40岁的莫德里奇大概率迎来最后一届世界杯——依旧是从后场调度全队节奏的节拍器
科瓦契奇-莫德里奇双后腰对阵高位逼抢:若有持球时间克罗地亚就能掌控比赛,被狠压时则可能吃力
年轻后卫格瓦迪奥尔(7000万欧)与卢卡·武什科维奇镇守边路——速度与带球推进,与老将中场形成鲜明对比

why.en: Croatia's most valuable player and best defender — a ball-playing centre-back with elite recovery pace who can also bomb forward from the left.
why.zh: 克罗地亚身价最高、防守最佳的球员——擅长出球、回追速度顶级的中卫,还能从左路插上助攻。

why.en: Teenage centre-back prodigy valued at €60m, breaking into the XI as the long-term heir to Croatia's defence.
why.zh: 身价6000万欧的中卫新星,以克罗地亚后防长期接班人的身份打入首发。

why.en: The 40-year-old captain and engine of Croatia's golden generation — still the passer who sets the team's tempo in a likely farewell World Cup.
why.zh: 40岁的队长、黄金一代的发动机——在大概率的告别之战里,依旧是掌控球队节奏的传球大师。

why.en: €40m Inter midfielder, the most valuable of Croatia's next-generation engine room and the heir to the Modric-Kovacic axis.
why.zh: 身价4000万欧的国米中场,是克罗地亚新生代中场最值钱的一位,莫德里奇-科瓦契奇中轴的接班人。

style.en: A fast, direct transition team under Carlos Queiroz: sit in a compact mid-block, win the ball through Partey, then spring electric pace out wide via Semenyo, Williams and Kamaldeen. Biggest strength is the raw speed and ball-carrying of the front line; biggest weakness is a thin, error-prone centre-back pairing and the creative void left by losing Mohammed Kudus to injury.
style.zh: 奎罗斯执教下是一支主打快速直接反击的球队：先用紧凑的中场区域防守落位，靠帕尔特伊抢断断球，再通过塞门约、威廉姆斯和卡马尔丁的边路速度发动闪电反击。最大优势是锋线的纯粹速度和带球冲击力；最大短板是中卫组合单薄易失误，且核心库杜斯因伤缺阵留下了组织创造力的真空。

en: Antoine Semenyo on the right — fresh off a £64m move to Man City, he is Ghana's one genuine difference-maker and their entire attack tilts toward his runs.
The all-pace front three: Semenyo, Iñaki Williams and Kamaldeen Sulemana can turn one turnover into a three-on-two break in seconds.
The center-back pairing under pressure — Mumin and young Adjetey will be tested all tournament by England and Croatia's movement; set-pieces and high balls are Ghana's soft spot.
zh: 右路的塞门约——刚以6400万英镑加盟曼城，他是加纳唯一真正能改变比赛的球员，整条进攻线都围绕他的插上展开。
纯速度型锋线三人组：塞门约、伊纳基·威廉姆斯和卡马尔丁能在几秒内把一次断球变成三打二的反击。
高压下的中卫组合——穆明和年轻的阿杰泰整届赛事都会被英格兰、克罗地亚的跑位反复考验；定位球和高球是加纳的软肋。

why.en: The metronome and leader who shields the back four and starts every transition; if he is overrun, Ghana fold.
why.zh: 屏护后防线、发动每一次反击的中场节拍器与领袖；一旦他被压制，加纳就会崩盘。

why.en: Ghana's best player by distance — pace, power and end product after a £64m move to Man City; the team's one elite weapon.
why.zh: 加纳遥遥领先的头号球员——速度、力量加终结能力，刚以6400万英镑加盟曼城；全队唯一的顶级武器。

why.en: The emotional heartbeat of the squad and a relentless runner in behind — turns Ghana's directness into clear chances.
why.zh: 全队的情感核心，永不停歇地向身后空当冲刺——把加纳的直接打法转化为真正的得分机会。

style.en: A disciplined, low-block defensive side that sits compact in a back three and springs forward through wing-backs and quick transitions. Their strength is organization and CONCACAF-hardened resilience; the weakness is limited goal threat and over-reliance on Carrasquilla to create.
style.zh: 一支纪律严明、善打防守反击的球队，用三中卫体系收缩成密集低位防线，靠两翼卫和快速转换推进。他们的强项是组织性和久经中北美洲赛事磨炼的韧性；弱点是进球手段有限，过度依赖卡拉斯基亚组织进攻。

en: Whether Carrasquilla (groin injury in the Liga MX final) is fit — he is the single creative engine the whole attack runs through
The wing-backs Murillo and Davis: Panama's width and chance creation come almost entirely from their overlaps
Set pieces and a packed low block — Panama hunt their first-ever World Cup win by frustrating opponents and striking on the counter
zh: 卡拉斯基亚（墨超决赛拉伤腹股沟）能否健康出战——整条进攻线都围绕他这唯一的组织核心运转
边翼卫穆里略和戴维斯：巴拿马的宽度和机会创造几乎全靠他们的套上助攻
定位球加密集低位防守——巴拿马靠激怒对手、伺机反击来争取队史首场世界杯胜利

why.en: 2018 World Cup starter back between the posts, providing calm and experience.
why.zh: 2018年世界杯首发门将回归，带来沉稳和经验。

why.en: Panama's most valuable player and key two-way wing-back — his overlaps are a main source of width and chance creation.
why.zh: 巴拿马身价最高的球员和关键攻防一体翼卫——他的套上是球队宽度和机会创造的主要来源。

why.en: Young Championship centre-back anchoring the back three; the squad's most promising defender.
why.zh: 效力英冠的年轻中卫，三中卫体系的定海神针，全队最具潜力的后卫。

why.en: Experienced central defender for organization in the low block.
why.zh: 经验丰富的中卫，负责密集防线的组织。

why.en: Ball-playing defender who helps progress play out of the back three.
why.zh: 善于出球的后卫，帮助三中卫体系向前推进。

why.en: Veteran left wing-back providing width on the opposite flank to Murillo.
why.zh: 老将左翼卫，在与穆里略相对的一侧提供宽度。

why.en: 36-year-old captain and record cap holder; the defensive screen in midfield.
why.zh: 36岁队长兼出场纪录保持者，中场的防守屏障。

why.en: 2023 Gold Cup Best Player and the team's creative engine — everything in attack runs through him.
why.zh: 2023年金杯赛最佳球员，球队的进攻发动机——所有进攻都经他之手。

why.en: Direct wide attacker who supports the lone striker and stretches defenses.
why.zh: 直接的边路攻击手，支援单箭头并拉开防线。

why.en: Creative second-line attacker linking midfield to the front man.
why.zh: 富有创造力的二线攻击手，串联中场与前锋。

why.en: León forward who leads the line after a prolific qualifying campaign — Panama's main goal threat.
why.zh: 莱昂前锋，预选赛进球如麻后领衔锋线——巴拿马的主要得分点。
